---
title: "Seasonality_11_June_2026"
output: html_document
date: "2026-June-11"
---

### Import libraries
```{r}
library(haven)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(lubridate)
library(dplyr)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(lme4) 
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(ggpubr)
library(emmeans)
library(sjstats)
library(mgcv)
library(tidyr)
library(visreg)
library(itsadug)
library(gratia)
library(readr)
library(glue)
library(purrr)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(metR)
library(broom)
library(hms)
library(ggpattern)
library(patchwork)
library(ggpp)
library(ggsignif)

# ---- Cyclic spline knots: enforce a true 12-month period ----
# With bs="cc" and MONTH_NUM in 1:12, the default knot placement ties
# month 1 == month 12, giving an 11-month cycle that forces Dec == Jan and
# distorts the December peak and every seasonal amplitude. Boundary knots at
# 0.5 and 12.5 give a proper 12-month period (Dec -> Jan is one step).
# Passed via `knots = MONTH_KNOTS` to every bam()/gam() with a MONTH_NUM cyclic smooth.
MONTH_KNOTS <- list(MONTH_NUM = c(0.5, 12.5))
```

### Read in data
```{r}
# Use cached RDS if available; otherwise read CSV and cache
data_rds <- "/Users/gregory.grosicki/Desktop/Seasonality/Seasonality_npjDig/Seasonality_Pull_22_Apr_2026.rds"
data_csv <- "/Users/gregory.grosicki/Desktop/Seasonality/Seasonality_npjDig/Seasonality_Pull_22_Apr_2026.csv"

if (file.exists(data_rds)) {
  df <- readRDS(data_rds)
} else {
  df <- read.csv(data_csv)
  saveRDS(df, data_rds)
}

# Create field for BMI
df <- df %>%
  mutate(BMI = WEIGHT / (HEIGHT^2))

# Create field for SHRZS
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    SHRZS = TOTAL_ZONE1_MIN * 1 +
            TOTAL_ZONE2_MIN * 2 +
            TOTAL_ZONE3_MIN * 3 +
            TOTAL_ZONE4_MIN * 4 +
            TOTAL_ZONE5_MIN * 5
  )
df <- df %>%
  mutate(SHRZS = ifelse(is.na(SHRZS), 0, SHRZS))
```

### Setup: Color palettes, theme, and helper functions
```{r}
# ---- Color palettes ----
age_colors <- c("Young" = "#66c2a5", "Middle" = "#fc8d62", "Old" = "#8da0cb")
gender_colors <- c("male" = "#1f78b4", "female" = "#f781bf")
gender_labels <- c("male" = "Male", "female" = "Female")
pa_colors <- c("Low" = "#e41a1c", "Moderate" = "#377eb8", "High" = "#4daf4a")
bmi_colors <- c("Normal" = "#4daf4a", "Overweight" = "#377eb8", "Obese" = "#e41a1c")

# ---- Custom theme ----
theme_seasonality <- function(legend = TRUE) {
  t <- theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_blank()
    )
  if (!legend) {
    t <- t + theme(legend.position = "none")
  } else {
    t <- t + theme(
      legend.title = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold")
    )
  }
  t
}

# ---- Bootstrap: participant-level resampling ----

# Single or grouped amplitude bootstrap
bootstrap_amplitude <- function(data, formula, by = NULL, B = 1000, seed = 2024) {
  set.seed(seed)
  user_ids <- unique(data$USER_ID)
  n_users <- length(user_ids)
  results <- vector("list", B)

  for (i in 1:B) {
    boot_ids <- sample(user_ids, n_users, replace = TRUE)
    boot_data <- tibble(.boot_user = seq_along(boot_ids), USER_ID = boot_ids) %>%
      left_join(data, by = "USER_ID", relationship = "many-to-many")

    boot_model <- tryCatch(
      suppressMessages(bam(formula, data = boot_data, method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS, discrete = TRUE)),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(boot_model)) next

    if (!is.null(by)) {
      v <- tryCatch(
        visreg(boot_model, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", by = by, overlay = TRUE,
               partial = FALSE, rug = FALSE, plot = FALSE),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (!is.null(v)) {
        results[[i]] <- v$fit %>%
          group_by(across(all_of(by))) %>%
          summarise(amplitude = max(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE),
                    .groups = "drop")
      }
    } else {
      v <- tryCatch(
        visreg(boot_model, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", partial = FALSE, rug = FALSE, plot = FALSE),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (!is.null(v)) {
        results[[i]] <- tibble(amplitude = max(v$fit$visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) -
                                           min(v$fit$visregFit, na.rm = TRUE))
      }
    }

    if (i %% 50 == 0) cat("Completed", i, "bootstraps\n")
  }

  bind_rows(results, .id = "iteration")
}

# Paired attenuation bootstrap (baseline vs adjusted)
bootstrap_attenuation <- function(data, formula_base, formula_adj, B = 1000, seed = 2024) {
  set.seed(seed)
  user_ids <- unique(data$USER_ID)
  n_users <- length(user_ids)
  amp_base <- rep(NA_real_, B)
  amp_adj  <- rep(NA_real_, B)

  for (i in 1:B) {
    boot_ids <- sample(user_ids, n_users, replace = TRUE)
    boot_data <- tibble(.boot_user = seq_along(boot_ids), USER_ID = boot_ids) %>%
      left_join(data, by = "USER_ID", relationship = "many-to-many")

    model_b <- tryCatch(
      bam(formula_base, data = boot_data, method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS, discrete = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    model_a <- tryCatch(
      bam(formula_adj, data = boot_data, method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS, discrete = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(model_b) && !is.null(model_a)) {
      vis_b <- tryCatch(visreg(model_b, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", partial = FALSE, rug = FALSE, plot = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
      vis_a <- tryCatch(visreg(model_a, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", partial = FALSE, rug = FALSE, plot = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)

      if (!is.null(vis_b) && !is.null(vis_a)) {
        amp_base[i] <- max(vis_b$fit$visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(vis_b$fit$visregFit, na.rm = TRUE)
        amp_adj[i]  <- max(vis_a$fit$visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(vis_a$fit$visregFit, na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    }

    if (i %% 50 == 0) cat("Completed", i, "bootstraps\n")
  }

  valid <- !is.na(amp_base) & !is.na(amp_adj)

  list(amp_base = amp_base[valid], amp_adj = amp_adj[valid], n_valid = sum(valid))
}

# Summary helper for attenuation results
summarize_attenuation <- function(att) {
  mean_base <- mean(att$amp_base)
  mean_adj  <- mean(att$amp_adj)
  mean_diff <- mean_base - mean_adj
  pct_att   <- (mean_diff / mean_base) * 100
  amp_diff  <- att$amp_base - att$amp_adj

  ci_base <- quantile(att$amp_base, c(0.025, 0.975))
  ci_adj  <- quantile(att$amp_adj, c(0.025, 0.975))
  ci_diff <- quantile(amp_diff, c(0.025, 0.975))

  # Bootstrap CI for percent attenuation (paired-resample distribution)
  pct_vec <- (att$amp_base - att$amp_adj) / att$amp_base * 100
  ci_pct  <- quantile(pct_vec, c(0.025, 0.975))

  t_result <- t.test(att$amp_base, att$amp_adj, paired = TRUE)

  cat("Mean Amplitude (Baseline):", round(mean_base, 3), "\n")
  cat("95% CI (Baseline):", round(ci_base[1], 3), "-", round(ci_base[2], 3), "\n\n")
  cat("Mean Amplitude (Adjusted):", round(mean_adj, 3), "\n")
  cat("95% CI (Adjusted):", round(ci_adj[1], 3), "-", round(ci_adj[2], 3), "\n\n")
  cat("Mean Difference:", round(mean_diff, 3), "\n")
  cat("95% CI for Difference:", round(ci_diff[1], 3), "-", round(ci_diff[2], 3), "\n\n")
  cat("Percent Attenuation:", round(pct_att, 1), "%\n")
  cat("95% CI for Percent Attenuation:", round(ci_pct[1], 1), "-", round(ci_pct[2], 1), "%\n\n")
  cat("Paired t-test p-value:", signif(t_result$p.value, 5), "\n")

  invisible(list(
    mean_base = mean_base, mean_adj = mean_adj,
    ci_base = ci_base, ci_adj = ci_adj,
    mean_diff = mean_diff, ci_diff = ci_diff,
    pct_attenuation = pct_att, ci_pct = ci_pct,
    t_test = t_result
  ))
}

# Marginal-trajectory prediction helper (lpmatrix-based)
# Computes the marginal seasonal curve averaged over factor covariates (e.g.,
# GENDER) using the proper quadratic form x'Vx for SEs. Averaging predicted
# variances across correlated predictions (as the prior version did) ignores
# Cov(p_i, p_j) and underestimates the marginal SE because predictions sharing
# fitted coefficients are highly correlated.
# Uses vcov(model, unconditional = TRUE) so CIs incorporate smoothing-parameter
# uncertainty (Bayesian credible interval; Marra & Wood 2012, Scand J Stat).
# Returns columns (MONTH_NUM, <by_var>, visregFit, visregLwr, visregUpr) — same
# shape as visreg's $fit, so downstream ggplot code is unchanged.
predict_marginal_trajectory <- function(model, data, by_var = NULL,
                                        exclude_re = NULL,
                                        month_grid = seq(1, 12, length.out = 200)) {
  pred_vars <- all.vars(delete.response(terms(model)))
  factor_marginalize <- intersect(pred_vars, c("GENDER")) |> setdiff(by_var)
  continuous <- setdiff(pred_vars, c("MONTH_NUM", by_var, "USER_ID", factor_marginalize))

  grid_args <- list(MONTH_NUM = month_grid)
  if (!is.null(by_var)) grid_args[[by_var]] <- levels(data[[by_var]])
  for (f in factor_marginalize) grid_args[[f]] <- levels(data[[f]])
  grid <- do.call(expand.grid, grid_args) |> as_tibble()

  for (v in continuous) grid[[v]] <- mean(data[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
  if ("USER_ID" %in% pred_vars) grid$USER_ID <- data$USER_ID[1]

  # Design matrix on link scale; `exclude` zeros out columns of excluded smooths
  # (e.g. the s(USER_ID) random effect) so predictions are population-level.
  pred_args <- list(model, newdata = grid, type = "lpmatrix")
  if (!is.null(exclude_re)) pred_args$exclude <- exclude_re
  X <- do.call(predict, pred_args)

  V    <- vcov(model, unconditional = TRUE)
  beta <- coef(model)

  # Average X rows within each (MONTH_NUM, by_var) cell. The marginal
  # prediction is then x_bar' beta and its SE is sqrt(x_bar' V x_bar),
  # which correctly accounts for shared coefficient uncertainty across
  # the marginalised factor levels.
  key_cols <- c("MONTH_NUM", by_var)
  cell_id <- do.call(paste, c(as.list(grid[key_cols]), sep = ""))
  unique_cells <- unique(cell_id)
  keys_out <- grid[match(unique_cells, cell_id), key_cols, drop = FALSE] |> as_tibble()

  X_bar <- t(vapply(unique_cells,
                    function(k) colMeans(X[cell_id == k, , drop = FALSE]),
                    numeric(ncol(X))))

  fit <- as.numeric(X_bar %*% beta)
  se  <- sqrt(rowSums((X_bar %*% V) * X_bar))

  keys_out %>%
    mutate(
      visregFit = fit,
      se_avg    = se,
      visregLwr = visregFit - 1.96 * se,
      visregUpr = visregFit + 1.96 * se
    )
}

# Marginal-mean + pairwise-contrast helper (lpmatrix-based)
# Replaces the manual emm_manual + compute_all_contrasts pattern in the GAMM
# Aim 1 sections. Marginal means are computed at each (by_var, MONTH_NUM)
# cell averaging over GENDER (when GENDER is not the by_var); pairwise contrasts
# use c = X_bar_i - X_bar_j with SE = sqrt(c' V c) so the cell covariance is
# properly accounted for. Holm-adjusted across all contrasts. Uses
# vcov(model, unconditional = TRUE) for Bayesian credible intervals.
# Note: contrast direction follows factor level order in `data[[by_var]]`.
# For AGE_BUCKET this gives Young-Middle, Young-Old, Middle-Old (Y/M/O level
# order set explicitly upstream). For GENDER it follows alphabetical order
# (female - male), so signed estimates differ from prior manual versions but
# magnitudes, p-values, and CIs are identical.
emmeans_contrasts_lpmatrix <- function(model, data, by_var, months = c(8, 12),
                                       exclude_re = "s(USER_ID)") {
  pred_vars <- all.vars(delete.response(terms(model)))
  factor_marginalize <- intersect(pred_vars, c("GENDER")) |> setdiff(by_var)
  continuous <- setdiff(pred_vars, c("MONTH_NUM", by_var, "USER_ID", factor_marginalize))

  grid_args <- list(MONTH_NUM = months)
  grid_args[[by_var]] <- levels(data[[by_var]])
  for (f in factor_marginalize) grid_args[[f]] <- levels(data[[f]])
  grid <- do.call(expand.grid, grid_args) |> as_tibble()

  for (v in continuous) grid[[v]] <- mean(data[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
  if ("USER_ID" %in% pred_vars) grid$USER_ID <- data$USER_ID[1]

  X    <- predict(model, newdata = grid, type = "lpmatrix", exclude = exclude_re)
  V    <- vcov(model, unconditional = TRUE)
  beta <- coef(model)

  cell_id <- do.call(paste, c(as.list(grid[c(by_var, "MONTH_NUM")]), sep = ""))
  unique_cells <- unique(cell_id)
  cell_meta <- grid[match(unique_cells, cell_id),
                    c(by_var, "MONTH_NUM"), drop = FALSE] |> as_tibble()
  X_bar <- t(vapply(unique_cells,
                    function(k) colMeans(X[cell_id == k, , drop = FALSE]),
                    numeric(ncol(X))))

  emm <- bind_cols(cell_meta, tibble(emmean = as.numeric(X_bar %*% beta)))

  groups <- levels(data[[by_var]])
  pairs  <- combn(groups, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  df_resid <- df.residual(model)

  contrast_rows <- list()
  for (m in months) {
    for (pair in pairs) {
      i <- which(cell_meta[[by_var]] == pair[1] & cell_meta$MONTH_NUM == m)
      j <- which(cell_meta[[by_var]] == pair[2] & cell_meta$MONTH_NUM == m)
      c_vec <- X_bar[i, ] - X_bar[j, ]
      contrast_rows[[length(contrast_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        MONTH_NUM = m,
        contrast  = paste(pair[1], "-", pair[2]),
        estimate  = as.numeric(c_vec %*% beta),
        SE        = sqrt(as.numeric(crossprod(c_vec, V %*% c_vec))),
        df        = df_resid
      )
    }
  }

  contrasts_df <- bind_rows(contrast_rows) %>%
    mutate(
      t.ratio  = estimate / SE,
      p.unadj  = 2 * pt(-abs(t.ratio), df = df),
      p.value  = p.adjust(p.unadj, method = "holm"),
      lower.CL = estimate - qt(0.975, df = df) * SE,
      upper.CL = estimate + qt(0.975, df = df) * SE
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(c(estimate, SE, t.ratio, p.unadj, p.value, lower.CL, upper.CL),
                  ~ round(.x, 3)))

  list(emm = emm, contrasts = contrasts_df)
}

# Pairwise bootstrap comparison helper
bootstrap_pairwise <- function(boot_df, group_var) {
  amp_wide <- boot_df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = all_of(group_var), values_from = amplitude) %>%
    na.omit()

  groups <- unique(boot_df[[group_var]])
  B <- nrow(amp_wide)

  pairs <- combn(groups, 2, simplify = FALSE)

  map_df(pairs, function(pair) {
    diff_vec <- amp_wide[[pair[2]]] - amp_wide[[pair[1]]]
    flips <- min(sum(diff_vec > 0), sum(diff_vec < 0))
    p_val <- if (flips == 0) {
      paste0("< ", formatC(2 / B, format = "f", digits = 3))
    } else {
      as.character(round(2 * flips / B, 3))
    }
    tibble(comparison = paste(pair[2], "vs", pair[1]), p_value = p_val)
  })
}

# ---- Inset-annotation helpers (Fig 1, 2, 3 D-I, 4, S2/S3 A&C, S6-S9) ----

# Format bootstrap p-value: pass through "< ..." strings as-is, prefix "= "
# to numeric strings. Input is the character p_value column from bootstrap_pairwise.
fmt_boot_p <- function(p) {
  ifelse(grepl("<", p), p, paste0("= ", p))
}

# Format numeric p-value (e.g. paired-t p from summarize_attenuation): "< 0.001"
# below threshold, "= 0.0XX" otherwise.
fmt_num_p <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("= %.3f", p))
}

# Build multi-line inset string for amplitude figures: group rows with bootstrap
# amplitude (95% CI) followed by pairwise p-values from bootstrap_pairwise.
# Headers in UPPERCASE for visual distinction (richtext/bold avoided to skip
# the gridtext dependency chain).
make_amp_inset <- function(amp_df, pval_df, by_var, group_levels = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(group_levels)) {
    amp_df <- amp_df[order(match(amp_df[[by_var]], group_levels)), ]
  }
  amp_lines <- sprintf("%s: %.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
                       amp_df[[by_var]], amp_df$mean_amp,
                       amp_df$ci_low, amp_df$ci_high)
  pval_lines <- sprintf("%s: p %s", pval_df$comparison, fmt_boot_p(pval_df$p_value))
  paste(c("AMPLITUDE (95% CI)", amp_lines, "",
          "PAIRWISE P-VALUES", pval_lines),
        collapse = "\n")
}

# Build one-line inset string for attenuation figures (Fig 3 D-I).
make_att_inset <- function(att_summary) {
  sprintf("Attenuation: %.1f%% (%.1f, %.1f); p %s",
          att_summary$pct_attenuation,
          att_summary$ci_pct[1], att_summary$ci_pct[2],
          fmt_num_p(att_summary$t_test$p.value))
}

# Layer wrappers: drop into ggplot pipelines via `p + amp_inset_layer(...)`.
# Insets render in the right margin under the legend (npcx > 1, clip = "off").
# Each helper returns a list containing the geom + a coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
# + theme adjustments (legend anchored to top of right margin, plot margin bumped
# to make room). The helper assumes the underlying plot has no prior coord_*().
amp_inset_layer <- function(amp_df, pval_df, by_var, group_levels = NULL,
                             npcx = 1.02, npcy = 0.45, size = 2.7,
                             margin_r = 110) {
  list(
    ggpp::geom_label_npc(
      data = tibble(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy,
                    label = make_amp_inset(amp_df, pval_df, by_var, group_levels)),
      aes(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy, label = label),
      hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = size, color = "black",
      label.size = 0.3, fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.85),
      label.padding = unit(0.3, "lines"), inherit.aes = FALSE
    ),
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off"),
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = margin_r, b = 5, l = 5),
          legend.justification = c("left", "top"))
  )
}

att_inset_layer <- function(att_summary, npcx = 1.02, npcy = 0.35, size = 3,
                             margin_r = 110) {
  list(
    ggpp::geom_label_npc(
      data = tibble(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy, label = make_att_inset(att_summary)),
      aes(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy, label = label),
      hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = size, color = "black",
      label.size = 0.3, fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.85),
      label.padding = unit(0.3, "lines"), inherit.aes = FALSE
    ),
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off"),
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = margin_r, b = 5, l = 5),
          legend.justification = c("left", "top"))
  )
}

# Bracket annotations on violin/box panels (Fig 1 B&D, Fig 2 B&D, Supp S2/S3 B&D)
# Uses pre-computed Tukey-adjusted p-values from emmeans `pairs()` rather than
# letting ggsignif run its own (unadjusted) test. step_increase auto-stacks
# brackets vertically; expand the panel ylim to leave headroom.
fmt_p_label <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "p < 0.001", sprintf("p = %.3f", p))
}

# Inset for GAMM panels (Supp Fig S2/S3 A&C): point-estimate amplitudes (no CI)
# + 2-column compact Aug | Dec p-values from emmeans_contrasts_lpmatrix output.
# Headers in UPPERCASE for visual distinction.
make_gamm_inset <- function(amp_df, contrasts_df, by_var, group_levels = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(group_levels)) {
    amp_df <- amp_df[order(match(amp_df[[by_var]], group_levels)), ]
  }
  amp_lines <- sprintf("%s: %.2f", amp_df[[by_var]], amp_df$amplitude)

  cw <- contrasts_df %>%
    select(contrast, MONTH_NUM, p.value) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = MONTH_NUM, values_from = p.value)

  fmt_p_compact <- function(p) ifelse(p < 0.001, "<.001", sprintf(".%03d", round(p * 1000)))
  pval_lines <- sprintf("%s: %s | %s", cw$contrast,
                        fmt_p_compact(cw$`8`), fmt_p_compact(cw$`12`))

  paste(c("AMPLITUDE (GAMM)", amp_lines, "",
          "AUG | DEC P-VALUES", pval_lines), collapse = "\n")
}

gamm_inset_layer <- function(amp_df, contrasts_df, by_var, group_levels = NULL,
                              npcx = 1.02, npcy = 0.45, size = 2.7,
                              margin_r = 110) {
  list(
    ggpp::geom_label_npc(
      data = tibble(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy,
                    label = make_gamm_inset(amp_df, contrasts_df, by_var, group_levels)),
      aes(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy, label = label),
      hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = size, color = "black",
      label.size = 0.3, fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.85),
      label.padding = unit(0.3, "lines"), inherit.aes = FALSE
    ),
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off"),
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = margin_r, b = 5, l = 5),
          legend.justification = c("left", "top"))
  )
}

# Aug→Dec within-group brackets + interaction-p subtitle for Supp S2/S3 B&D.
# Reads Holm-adjusted contrasts from emmeans(model, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | by_var).
# Bracket spans the two dodged box positions for each group (dodge_width/4 from
# center). Interaction p comes from anova(model) at the by_var:MONTH_LABEL row
# (lmerTest gives Satterthwaite-df F-test p-values).
aug_dec_brackets_layer <- function(model, data, y_var, by_var, group_levels,
                                   interaction_term, by_label,
                                   dodge_width = 0.75, textsize = 3) {
  emm_within <- emmeans::emmeans(model,
                                 as.formula(paste("pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL |", by_var)),
                                 adjust = "holm")
  cw <- as.data.frame(emm_within$contrasts)
  cw <- cw[match(group_levels, cw[[by_var]]), ]

  n_groups <- length(group_levels)
  half_dodge <- dodge_width / 4
  xmin <- seq_len(n_groups) - half_dodge
  xmax <- seq_len(n_groups) + half_dodge

  # 99th percentile keeps brackets just above the whiskers even when extreme
  # outliers sit outside coord_cartesian's ylim (which would clip the brackets).
  y_max <- quantile(data[[y_var]], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_pos <- rep(y_max * 1.04, n_groups)

  int_p <- anova(model)[interaction_term, "Pr(>F)"]
  int_label <- sprintf("%s × Month: %s", by_label, fmt_p_label(int_p))

  list(
    ggsignif::geom_signif(
      annotations = fmt_p_label(cw$p.value),
      xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax,
      y_position = y_pos,
      tip_length = 0.01, textsize = textsize, vjust = -0.2
    ),
    labs(subtitle = int_label),
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5))
  )
}

# One-line β annotation for Figure S5 (geographic daylight regression).
# Sources values from daylight_results_cluster (cluster-robust SEs by state).
beta_inset_layer <- function(daylight_df, outcome, unit,
                             npcx = 1.02, npcy = 0.35, size = 3,
                             margin_r = 130) {
  r <- daylight_df[daylight_df$Outcome == outcome, , drop = FALSE]
  p_str <- if (r$p_value < 0.001) "< 0.001" else sprintf("= %.3f", r$p_value)
  label <- sprintf("β = %.3f %s (95%% CI: %.3f, %.3f); p %s",
                   r$beta_daylight, unit, r$ci_low, r$ci_high, p_str)
  list(
    ggpp::geom_label_npc(
      data = tibble(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy, label = label),
      aes(npcx = npcx, npcy = npcy, label = label),
      hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = size, color = "black",
      label.size = 0.3, fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.85),
      label.padding = unit(0.3, "lines"), inherit.aes = FALSE
    ),
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off"),
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = margin_r, b = 5, l = 5),
          legend.justification = c("left", "top"))
  )
}

violin_brackets_layer <- function(tukey_obj, comparisons, group_levels,
                                  y_positions, tip_length = 0.4,
                                  textsize = 3, linewidth = 0.4) {
  # Manual brackets via geom_segment + geom_text. Replaces a prior ggsignif
  # implementation (broken under ggplot2 4.x as of ggsignif 0.6.4). Caller
  # supplies group_levels (factor order on x-axis) and y_positions (one per
  # comparison, in data units of the y-axis).
  td <- as.data.frame(tukey_obj)
  contrasts_str <- as.character(td$contrast)
  pair_keys <- vapply(strsplit(contrasts_str, " - ", fixed = TRUE),
                      function(x) paste(sort(x), collapse = "|"),
                      character(1))
  p_lookup <- setNames(td$p.value, pair_keys)

  brackets <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(comparisons), function(i) {
    comp <- comparisons[[i]]
    key <- paste(sort(comp), collapse = "|")
    p <- p_lookup[[key]]
    label <- if (is.null(p) || is.na(p)) "p = ?" else fmt_p_label(p)
    data.frame(
      x1 = match(comp[1], group_levels),
      x2 = match(comp[2], group_levels),
      y  = y_positions[i],
      label = label,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))

  list(
    # Horizontal bracket bar
    geom_segment(data = brackets,
                 aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y, yend = y),
                 linewidth = linewidth, inherit.aes = FALSE),
    # Left tip (down-pointing)
    geom_segment(data = brackets,
                 aes(x = x1, xend = x1, y = y - tip_length, yend = y),
                 linewidth = linewidth, inherit.aes = FALSE),
    # Right tip (down-pointing)
    geom_segment(data = brackets,
                 aes(x = x2, xend = x2, y = y - tip_length, yend = y),
                 linewidth = linewidth, inherit.aes = FALSE),
    # Label above bar
    geom_text(data = brackets,
              aes(x = (x1 + x2) / 2, y = y + tip_length * 0.5, label = label),
              size = textsize, vjust = 0, inherit.aes = FALSE)
  )
}
```

### Make monthly dataframe
```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    LOWER_DAYS = as.Date(LOWER_DAYS),
    MONTH = floor_date(LOWER_DAYS, "month")
  )

df_month <- df %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, MONTH) %>%
  summarise(
    RESTING_HEART_RATE = mean(RESTING_HEART_RATE, na.rm = TRUE),
    HRV = mean(HRV, na.rm = TRUE),
    SHRZS = mean(SHRZS, na.rm = TRUE),
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP = mean(MINUTES_OF_SLEEP, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Static user fields
    STRAP_GENERATION = first(na.omit(STRAP_GENERATION)),
    HEIGHT = first(na.omit(HEIGHT)),
    WEIGHT = first(na.omit(WEIGHT)),
    GENDER = first(na.omit(GENDER)),
    BMI = first(na.omit(BMI)),
    AGE_2023 = first(na.omit(AGE_2023)),
    AGE_BUCKET = first(na.omit(AGE_BUCKET)),
    STATE = first(na.omit(STATE)),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

df_month <- df_month %>%
  group_by(USER_ID) %>%
  mutate(
    # Person-level mean (between-person)
    SHRZS_b = mean(SHRZS, na.rm = TRUE),
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b = mean(MINUTES_OF_SLEEP, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Person-mean centered (within-person)
    SHRZS_w = SHRZS - SHRZS_b,
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w = MINUTES_OF_SLEEP - MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

### Compute some descriptive stats
```{r}
# Compute some descriptive stats
df_person <- df_month %>%
  group_by(USER_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    RESTING_HEART_RATE = mean(RESTING_HEART_RATE, na.rm = TRUE),
    HRV = mean(HRV, na.rm = TRUE),
    SHRZS = mean(SHRZS, na.rm = TRUE),
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP = mean(MINUTES_OF_SLEEP, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Retain static attributes
    BMI = first(na.omit(BMI)),
    AGE_2023 = first(na.omit(AGE_2023)),
    GENDER = first(na.omit(GENDER)),
    AGE_BUCKET = first(na.omit(AGE_BUCKET)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

describe_vars <- function(data, group_name = "Overall") {
  vars <- c("RESTING_HEART_RATE", "HRV", "SHRZS", "MINUTES_OF_SLEEP", "BMI", "AGE_2023")
  
  summary_stats <- data %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(vars),
                     list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                          sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"))
  
  summary_stats$Group <- group_name
  return(summary_stats)
}

# Overall
overall_stats <- describe_vars(df_person, "Overall")

# By GENDER
gender_stats <- df_person %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  group_modify(~describe_vars(.x, unique(.x$GENDER)))

# By AGE_BUCKET
agebucket_stats <- df_person %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  group_modify(~describe_vars(.x, unique(.x$AGE_BUCKET)))

# Combine all results
descriptive_summary <- bind_rows(overall_stats, gender_stats, agebucket_stats)

# Variables to test
vars <- c(
  "RESTING_HEART_RATE",
  "HRV",
  "SHRZS",
  "MINUTES_OF_SLEEP",
  "BMI",
  "AGE_2023"
)

# Run Welch t-tests for each variable
gender_ttests <- map_df(vars, function(v) {

  tt <- t.test(df_person[[v]] ~ df_person$GENDER)

  tibble(
    Variable = v,
    mean_male = mean(df_person[[v]][df_person$GENDER == "male"], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_female = mean(df_person[[v]][df_person$GENDER == "female"], na.rm = TRUE),
    diff = mean_female - mean_male,
    t = as.numeric(tt$statistic),
    p = round(tt$p.value, 4)
  )
})

# Apply Holm correction across all variables
gender_ttests$p_holm <- round(p.adjust(gender_ttests$p, method = "holm"), 4)

gender_ttests

# Run ANOVA for each variable
agebucket_anova <- map_df(vars, function(v) {

  model <- aov(df_person[[v]] ~ df_person$AGE_BUCKET)
  tidy_res <- tidy(model)[1, ]  # Extract only the AGE_BUCKET row

  tibble(
    Variable = v,
    F = round(tidy_res$statistic, 2),
    p = round(tidy_res$p.value, 4)
  )
})

# Apply Holm correction across all variables
agebucket_anova$p_holm <- round(p.adjust(agebucket_anova$p, method = "holm"), 4)

agebucket_anova

# Variables to follow up on (excluding BMI)
followup_vars <- c(
  "RESTING_HEART_RATE",
  "HRV",
  "SHRZS",
  "MINUTES_OF_SLEEP",
  "AGE_2023"
)

# Run ANOVA + Tukey HSD per variable
tukey_results <- map_df(followup_vars, function(v) {
  
  model <- aov(df_person[[v]] ~ df_person$AGE_BUCKET)
  tk <- TukeyHSD(model, "df_person$AGE_BUCKET")
  
  as_tibble(tk$`df_person$AGE_BUCKET`, rownames = "contrast") %>%
    mutate(
      Variable = v,
      estimate = round(diff, 4),
      p_adj = round(`p adj`, 4)
    ) %>%
    select(Variable, contrast, estimate, p_adj)
})

tukey_results

```

### Create field for month and compute RHR/HRV offset (decompose)
```{r}
# Create field for month
df_month <- df_month %>%
  mutate(
    MONTH_NUM = month(MONTH),  
    GENDER = as.factor(GENDER),
    USER_ID = as.factor(USER_ID)
  )

df_month <- df_month %>%
  group_by(USER_ID) %>%
  mutate(
    # Between-person RHR: average per user
    RHR_person_mean = mean(RESTING_HEART_RATE, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Within-person RHR: deviation from person's mean (centered RHR)
    RHR_within = RESTING_HEART_RATE - RHR_person_mean
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

df_month <- df_month %>%
  group_by(USER_ID) %>%
  mutate(
    # Between-person HRV: average per user
    HRV_person_mean = mean(HRV, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Within-person HRV: deviation from person's mean (centered HRV)
    HRV_within = HRV - HRV_person_mean
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```


# AIM 1
## RHR Overall
```{r}
# Baseline RHR model (stored for reuse in Aim 2 attenuation analyses)
model_rhr_baseline <- bam(
  RHR_within ~
    s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) +
    s(AGE_2023) +
    GENDER +
    BMI +
    RHR_person_mean,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_df_rhr_overall <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_rhr_baseline, data = df_month)

p_s1a <- ggplot(v_df_rhr_overall, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit)) +
  geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr),
              fill = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)
p_s1a

# ---- Identify modeled peak/trough and amplitude ----
peak_month <- v_df_rhr_overall %>% filter(visregFit == max(visregFit)) %>% select(MONTH_NUM, visregFit)
trough_month <- v_df_rhr_overall %>% filter(visregFit == min(visregFit)) %>% select(MONTH_NUM, visregFit)
modeled_amplitude <- peak_month$visregFit - trough_month$visregFit

# Bootstrap amplitude (participant-level resampling)
formula_rhr_baseline <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean

boot_rhr_overall <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_rhr_baseline)

amplitude_ci <- quantile(boot_rhr_overall$amplitude, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
amplitude_mean <- mean(boot_rhr_overall$amplitude, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Bootstrapped amplitude mean:", round(amplitude_mean, 3), "\n")
cat("95% CI:", round(amplitude_ci[1], 3), "-", round(amplitude_ci[2], 3), "\n")
```

## HRV Overall
```{r}
# Baseline HRV model (stored for reuse in Aim 2 attenuation analyses)
model_hrv_baseline <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_df_hrv_overall <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_hrv_baseline, data = df_month)

p_s1b <- ggplot(v_df_hrv_overall, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit)) +
  geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), fill = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)
p_s1b

# ---- Identify modeled peak/trough and amplitude ----
peak_month <- v_df_hrv_overall %>% filter(visregFit == max(visregFit)) %>% select(MONTH_NUM, visregFit)
trough_month <- v_df_hrv_overall %>% filter(visregFit == min(visregFit)) %>% select(MONTH_NUM, visregFit)
modeled_amplitude <- peak_month$visregFit - trough_month$visregFit

# Bootstrap amplitude (participant-level resampling)
formula_hrv_baseline <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean

boot_hrv_overall <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_hrv_baseline)

amplitude_ci <- quantile(boot_hrv_overall$amplitude, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
amplitude_mean <- mean(boot_hrv_overall$amplitude, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Bootstrapped amplitude mean:", round(amplitude_mean, 3), "\n")
cat("95% CI:", round(amplitude_ci[1], 3), "-", round(amplitude_ci[2], 3), "\n")
```


## RHR by AGE
### Model 1 - GAM
```{r}
df_month <- df_month %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

# ---- Fit GAMM model with cyclic spline by AGE_BUCKET ----
model_rhr_age <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# Extract smooths via marginal-trajectory helper
v_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_age,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET"
) %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))


# ---- Plot ----
p_fig1a <- ggplot(v_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = AGE_BUCKET, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig1a


# ---- Bootstrap modeled amplitude by AGE_BUCKET ----
formula_rhr_age <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean

boot_rhr_age <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_rhr_age, by = "AGE_BUCKET")

bootstrap_summary <- boot_rhr_age %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_age, "AGE_BUCKET")
```
### Model 2 - GAMM
```{r}
set.seed(2024)

subsample_ids <- df_month %>%
  distinct(USER_ID, AGE_BUCKET, GENDER) %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET, GENDER) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 1000) %>%
  ungroup()

df_sub <- df_month %>%
  semi_join(subsample_ids, by = "USER_ID")

df_sub <- df_sub %>%
  mutate(USER_ID = as.factor(USER_ID))

df_sub <- df_sub %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

model_rhr_age_mixed <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ 
    s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + 
    AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean + 
    s(USER_ID, bs = "re"),
  data = df_sub,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

summary(model_rhr_age_mixed)

# Extract smooths via marginal-trajectory helper (excluding random effect)
v_mixed_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_age_mixed,
  data = df_sub,
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET",
  exclude_re = "s(USER_ID)"
) %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))


# Plot
p_s2a <- ggplot(v_mixed_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = AGE_BUCKET, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s2a

#Extract amplitude values
amplitude_gamm <- v_mixed_df %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    amplitude = max(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE),
    peak_month = MONTH_NUM[which.max(visregFit)],
    trough_month = MONTH_NUM[which.min(visregFit)],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

## EMMEANS Comparisons via lpmatrix
res <- emmeans_contrasts_lpmatrix(model_rhr_age_mixed, data = df_sub, by_var = "AGE_BUCKET")
emm_manual    <- res$emm
contrasts_all <- res$contrasts

print("Estimated Marginal Means:")
print(emm_manual)
print("Pairwise Contrasts:")
print(contrasts_all)
```
### Model 3 - Individual Level Amplitude
```{r}
# ---- Compute per-person RHR amplitude: December - August ----
df_amplitude <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = case_when(
    MONTH_NUM == 8 ~ "August",
    MONTH_NUM == 12 ~ "December"
  )) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rhr = mean(RHR_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    AGE_BUCKET = first(AGE_BUCKET),
    AGE_2023 = first(AGE_2023),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    GENDER = first(GENDER),
    RHR_person_mean = first(RHR_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_rhr) %>%
  mutate(
    amplitude = December - August  # RHR: winter minus summer
  )

# ---- Per-person amplitude summary by age bucket ----
amplitude_summary <- df_amplitude %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amplitude = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_amplitude = sd(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    mean_sd = paste0(round(mean_amplitude, 2), " ± ", round(sd_amplitude, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---- Linear model predicting per-person amplitude ----
model_amplitude <- lm(amplitude ~ AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean, data = df_amplitude)
anova(model_amplitude)
# ---- 95% Confidence Intervals for model coefficients ----
confint(model_amplitude)

# Get estimated marginal means
emm <- emmeans(model_amplitude, ~ AGE_BUCKET)
# Pairwise Tukey comparisons
tukey_results <- pairs(emm, adjust = "tukey")
# View results
summary(tukey_results, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))  # Adds CIs and p-values


df_amplitude <- df_amplitude %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

p_fig1b <- ggplot(df_amplitude, aes(x = AGE_BUCKET, y = amplitude, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Amplitude (Dec − Aug, bpm)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 13)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "RHR Amplitude (Dec − Aug, bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE) +
  violin_brackets_layer(tukey_results,
    comparisons = list(c("Young", "Middle"), c("Middle", "Old"), c("Young", "Old")),
    group_levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old"),
    y_positions = c(10.5, 11.7, 12.9))
p_fig1b
```
### Model 4 - Box and Whisker of Raw RHR Values in Peak and Trough Months by Age
```{r}
# Filter for August and December
df_aug_dec <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(
    MONTH_LABEL = factor(ifelse(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "December"), levels = c("August", "December")),
    AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")),
    pattern = ifelse(MONTH_LABEL == "December", "stripe", "none")
  )
# Plot using ggpattern
p_s2b <- ggplot(df_aug_dec, aes(x = AGE_BUCKET, y = RESTING_HEART_RATE)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = AGE_BUCKET,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = AGE_BUCKET
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, AGE_BUCKET)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none",
    pattern = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "grey70",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02
      )
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Resting Heart Rate (bpm)"
  ) +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s2b

# Fit linear mixed model with AGE_BUCKET * MONTH_NUM interaction
model_aug_dec_rhr_age <- lmer(
  RESTING_HEART_RATE ~ AGE_BUCKET * MONTH_LABEL + GENDER + BMI + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_aug_dec
)

anova(model_aug_dec_rhr_age)

# Age group comparisons within each month
emmeans(model_aug_dec_rhr_age, pairwise ~ AGE_BUCKET | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")

# August vs December within each age group
emmeans(model_aug_dec_rhr_age, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | AGE_BUCKET, adjust = "holm")

# Add within-group Aug→Dec brackets + interaction-p subtitle
p_s2b <- p_s2b + aug_dec_brackets_layer(
  model_aug_dec_rhr_age, df_aug_dec, y_var = "RESTING_HEART_RATE",
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET", group_levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old"),
  interaction_term = "AGE_BUCKET:MONTH_LABEL", by_label = "Age"
)
```


## HRV by AGE
### Model 1 - GAM
```{r}
# GAM model for HRV
model_hrv_age <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)


v_hrv_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_age,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET"
) %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

p_fig1c <- ggplot(v_hrv_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = AGE_BUCKET, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig1c


# ---- Bootstrap modeled amplitude by AGE_BUCKET ----
formula_hrv_age <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean

boot_hrv_age <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_hrv_age, by = "AGE_BUCKET")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_age <- boot_hrv_age %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_age <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_age, "AGE_BUCKET")
```
### Model 2 - GAMM
```{r}
model_hrv_age_mixed <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ 
    s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) +
    AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean +
    s(USER_ID, bs = "re"),
  data = df_sub,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

summary(model_hrv_age_mixed)


v_mixed_hrv_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_age_mixed,
  data = df_sub,
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET",
  exclude_re = "s(USER_ID)"
) %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

p_s2c <- ggplot(v_mixed_hrv_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = AGE_BUCKET, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s2c

amplitude_gamm_hrv <- v_mixed_hrv_df %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    amplitude = max(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE),
    peak_month = MONTH_NUM[which.max(visregFit)],
    trough_month = MONTH_NUM[which.min(visregFit)],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- HRV EMMEANS comparisons via lpmatrix ---
res_hrv <- emmeans_contrasts_lpmatrix(model_hrv_age_mixed, data = df_sub, by_var = "AGE_BUCKET")
emm_manual_hrv    <- res_hrv$emm
contrasts_all_hrv <- res_hrv$contrasts

print("Estimated Marginal Means (HRV):")
print(emm_manual_hrv)
print("Pairwise Contrasts (HRV):")
print(contrasts_all_hrv)
```
### Model 3 - Invividual Level Amplitude
```{r}
df_amplitude_hrv <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = case_when(
    MONTH_NUM == 8 ~ "August",
    MONTH_NUM == 12 ~ "December"
  )) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_hrv = mean(HRV_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    AGE_BUCKET = first(AGE_BUCKET),
    AGE_2023 = first(AGE_2023),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    GENDER = first(GENDER),
    HRV_person_mean = first(HRV_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_hrv) %>%
  mutate(
    amplitude = August - December   
  )

amplitude_summary_hrv <- df_amplitude_hrv %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amplitude = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_amplitude = sd(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    mean_sd = paste0(round(mean_amplitude, 2), " ± ", round(sd_amplitude, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

model_amplitude_hrv <- lm(amplitude ~ AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean, 
                          data = df_amplitude_hrv)

anova(model_amplitude_hrv)
confint(model_amplitude_hrv)

emm_hrv <- emmeans(model_amplitude_hrv, ~ AGE_BUCKET)

tukey_results_hrv <- pairs(emm_hrv, adjust = "tukey")

summary(tukey_results_hrv, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))

df_amplitude_hrv <- df_amplitude_hrv %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

p_fig1d <- ggplot(df_amplitude_hrv, aes(x = AGE_BUCKET, y = amplitude, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Amplitude (Aug − Dec, ms)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-20, 40)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "HRV Amplitude (Aug − Dec, ms)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE) +
  violin_brackets_layer(tukey_results_hrv,
    comparisons = list(c("Young", "Middle"), c("Middle", "Old"), c("Young", "Old")),
    group_levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old"),
    y_positions = c(31, 34, 37),
    tip_length = 1)
p_fig1d
```
### Model 4 - Box and Whisker of Raw HRV values in Peak and Trough Months by Age
```{r}
# Plot
p_s2d <- ggplot(df_aug_dec, aes(x = AGE_BUCKET, y = HRV)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = AGE_BUCKET,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = AGE_BUCKET
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, AGE_BUCKET)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none",
    pattern = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "grey70",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02
      )
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Heart Rate Variability (ms)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 150)) +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s2d

# ---- Step 4: Linear Mixed Model ----
model_aug_dec_hrv_age <- lmer(
  HRV ~ AGE_BUCKET * MONTH_LABEL + GENDER + BMI + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_aug_dec
)

# ---- Step 5: ANOVA table ----
anova(model_aug_dec_hrv_age)

# ---- Step 6: Pairwise comparisons ----

# Age group comparisons within each month
emmeans(model_aug_dec_hrv_age, pairwise ~ AGE_BUCKET | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")

# August vs December within each age group
emmeans(model_aug_dec_hrv_age, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | AGE_BUCKET, adjust = "holm")

# Add within-group Aug→Dec brackets + interaction-p subtitle
p_s2d <- p_s2d + aug_dec_brackets_layer(
  model_aug_dec_hrv_age, df_aug_dec, y_var = "HRV",
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET", group_levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old"),
  interaction_term = "AGE_BUCKET:MONTH_LABEL", by_label = "Age"
)
```


## RHR by SEX
### Model 1 - GAM
```{r}
df_month <- df_month %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))  

model_rhr_gender <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) + GENDER + s(AGE_2023) + BMI + RHR_person_mean,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_df_gender <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_gender,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "GENDER"
) %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))

p_fig2a <- ggplot(v_df_gender, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = GENDER, fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()

p_fig2a

formula_rhr_sex <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) + GENDER + s(AGE_2023) + BMI + RHR_person_mean

boot_rhr_sex <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_rhr_sex, by = "GENDER")

bootstrap_summary_sex_rhr <- boot_rhr_sex %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_sex_rhr <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_sex, "GENDER")
```
### Model 2 - GAMM
```{r}
model_rhr_gender_mixed <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ 
    s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) +
    GENDER + s(AGE_2023) + BMI + RHR_person_mean +
    s(USER_ID, bs = "re"),
  data = df_sub,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_mixed_gender_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_gender_mixed,
  data = df_sub,
  by_var = "GENDER",
  exclude_re = "s(USER_ID)"
) %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))

p_s3a <- ggplot(v_mixed_gender_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = GENDER, fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()

p_s3a

amplitude_gamm_gender <- v_mixed_gender_df %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    amplitude = max(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE),
    peak_month = MONTH_NUM[which.max(visregFit)],
    trough_month = MONTH_NUM[which.min(visregFit)],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- RHR-by-Gender EMMEANS comparisons via lpmatrix ---
res_gender <- emmeans_contrasts_lpmatrix(model_rhr_gender_mixed, data = df_sub, by_var = "GENDER")
emm_manual_gender <- res_gender$emm
gender_contrasts  <- res_gender$contrasts

print("Estimated Marginal Means (RHR by Gender):")
print(emm_manual_gender)
print("Gender Contrasts (RHR):")
print(gender_contrasts)
```
### Model 3 - Individual Level Amplitude
```{r}
df_amplitude_gender <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = case_when(
    MONTH_NUM == 8 ~ "August",
    MONTH_NUM == 12 ~ "December"
  )) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rhr = mean(RHR_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    GENDER = first(GENDER),
    AGE_2023 = first(AGE_2023),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    RHR_person_mean = first(RHR_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_rhr) %>%
  mutate(
    amplitude = December - August
  )

amplitude_summary_gender <- df_amplitude_gender %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amplitude = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_amplitude = sd(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    mean_sd = paste0(round(mean_amplitude, 2), " ± ", round(sd_amplitude, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

model_amplitude_gender <- lm(amplitude ~ GENDER + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + RHR_person_mean, data = df_amplitude_gender)
anova(model_amplitude_gender)

confint(model_amplitude_gender)

emm_gender <- emmeans(model_amplitude_gender, ~ GENDER)
tukey_gender <- pairs(emm_gender, adjust = "tukey")
summary(tukey_gender, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))

# Set order of GENDER for plotting
df_amplitude_gender <- df_amplitude_gender %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))

p_fig2b <- ggplot(df_amplitude_gender, aes(x = GENDER, y = amplitude, fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = gender_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Amplitude (Dec - Aug, bpm)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 12)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "RHR Amplitude (Dec - Aug, bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE) +
  violin_brackets_layer(tukey_gender,
    comparisons = list(c("male", "female")),
    group_levels = c("male", "female"),
    y_positions = c(10.5))

p_fig2b

```
### Model 4 - Box and Whisker of Raw RHR Values in Peak and Trough Months by Sex
```{r}
# ---- Boxplot of Raw RHR ----
# Order x-axis male, female to match panel D (Figure S3D)
df_aug_dec <- df_aug_dec %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))
p_s3b <- ggplot(df_aug_dec, aes(x = GENDER, y = RESTING_HEART_RATE)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = GENDER,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = GENDER
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, GENDER)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = gender_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = gender_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none",
    pattern = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "grey70",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02
      )
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Resting Heart Rate (bpm)"
  ) +
  theme_seasonality()

p_s3b

# ---- Linear Mixed Model: Sex × Month ----
model_aug_dec_rhr_gender <- lmer(
  RESTING_HEART_RATE ~ GENDER * MONTH_LABEL + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_aug_dec
)

anova(model_aug_dec_rhr_gender)

# ---- Pairwise comparisons: sex differences within each month ----
emmeans(model_aug_dec_rhr_gender, pairwise ~ GENDER | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")

# ---- Pairwise comparisons: month differences within each sex ----
emmeans(model_aug_dec_rhr_gender, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | GENDER, adjust = "holm")

# Add within-sex Aug→Dec brackets + interaction-p subtitle
p_s3b <- p_s3b + aug_dec_brackets_layer(
  model_aug_dec_rhr_gender, df_aug_dec, y_var = "RESTING_HEART_RATE",
  by_var = "GENDER", group_levels = c("female", "male"),
  interaction_term = "GENDER:MONTH_LABEL", by_label = "Sex"
)

# Refit model with only main effects
model_rhr_gender_main <- lmer(
  RESTING_HEART_RATE ~ GENDER + MONTH_LABEL + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_aug_dec
)
anova(model_rhr_gender_main)

# EMMs for gender
emmeans(model_rhr_gender_main, ~ GENDER)

# EMMs for month
emmeans(model_rhr_gender_main, ~ MONTH_LABEL)
```


## HRV by SEX
### Model 1
```{r}
model_hrv_gender <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) + GENDER + s(AGE_2023) + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_df_gender_hrv <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_gender,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "GENDER"
) %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))

p_fig2c <- ggplot(v_df_gender_hrv, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = GENDER, fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()

p_fig2c

formula_hrv_sex <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) + GENDER + s(AGE_2023) + BMI + HRV_person_mean

boot_hrv_sex <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_hrv_sex, by = "GENDER")

bootstrap_summary_sex_hrv <- boot_hrv_sex %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_sex_hrv <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_sex, "GENDER")
```
### Model 2
```{r}
model_hrv_gender_mixed <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ 
    s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) +
    GENDER + s(AGE_2023) + BMI + HRV_person_mean +
    s(USER_ID, bs = "re"),
  data = df_sub,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_mixed_gender_df_hrv <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_gender_mixed,
  data = df_sub,
  by_var = "GENDER",
  exclude_re = "s(USER_ID)"
) %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))

p_s3c <- ggplot(v_mixed_gender_df_hrv, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = GENDER, fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Sex", values = gender_colors, labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()

p_s3c

amplitude_gamm_gender_hrv <- v_mixed_gender_df_hrv %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    amplitude = max(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(visregFit, na.rm = TRUE),
    peak_month = MONTH_NUM[which.max(visregFit)],
    trough_month = MONTH_NUM[which.min(visregFit)],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- HRV-by-Gender EMMEANS comparisons via lpmatrix ---
res_gender_hrv <- emmeans_contrasts_lpmatrix(model_hrv_gender_mixed, data = df_sub, by_var = "GENDER")
emm_manual_gender_hrv <- res_gender_hrv$emm
gender_contrasts_hrv  <- res_gender_hrv$contrasts

print("Estimated Marginal Means (HRV by Gender):")
print(emm_manual_gender_hrv)
print("Gender Contrasts (HRV):")
print(gender_contrasts_hrv)
```
### Model 3
```{r}
df_amplitude_gender_hrv <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = case_when(
    MONTH_NUM == 8 ~ "August",
    MONTH_NUM == 12 ~ "December"
  )) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_hrv = mean(HRV_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    GENDER = first(GENDER),
    AGE_2023 = first(AGE_2023),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    HRV_person_mean = first(HRV_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_hrv) %>%
  mutate(
    amplitude = August - December
  )

amplitude_summary_gender_hrv <- df_amplitude_gender_hrv %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amplitude = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_amplitude = sd(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    mean_sd = paste0(round(mean_amplitude, 2), " ± ", round(sd_amplitude, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

model_amplitude_gender_hrv <- lm(amplitude ~ GENDER + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + HRV_person_mean, data = df_amplitude_gender_hrv)
anova(model_amplitude_gender_hrv)
confint(model_amplitude_gender_hrv)

emm_gender_hrv <- emmeans(model_amplitude_gender_hrv, ~ GENDER)
tukey_gender_hrv <- pairs(emm_gender_hrv, adjust = "tukey")
summary(tukey_gender_hrv, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))

df_amplitude_gender_hrv <- df_amplitude_gender_hrv %>%
  mutate(GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")))

p_fig2d <- ggplot(df_amplitude_gender_hrv, aes(x = GENDER, y = amplitude, fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 21, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = gender_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Amplitude (Aug - Dec, ms)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-20, 35)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "HRV Amplitude (Aug - Dec, ms)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE) +
  violin_brackets_layer(tukey_gender_hrv,
    comparisons = list(c("male", "female")),
    group_levels = c("male", "female"),
    y_positions = c(31),
    tip_length = 1)

p_fig2d
```
### Model 4 - Box and Whisker of Raw HRV Values in Peak and Trough Months by Sex
```{r}
# ---- Filter and prepare data ----
df_aug_dec_hrv <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(
    MONTH_LABEL = factor(ifelse(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "December"),
                         levels = c("August", "December")),
    GENDER = factor(GENDER, levels = c("male", "female")),
    pattern = ifelse(MONTH_LABEL == "December", "stripe", "none")
  )

# ---- Boxplot: HRV by Sex and Month ----
p_s3d <- ggplot(df_aug_dec_hrv, aes(x = GENDER, y = HRV)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = GENDER,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = GENDER
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, GENDER)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = gender_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = gender_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = gender_labels) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none",
    pattern = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "grey70",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02
      )
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Heart Rate Variability (ms)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 150)) +
  theme_seasonality()

p_s3d

# ---- Full model with interaction ----
model_hrv_gender_interact <- lmer(
  HRV ~ GENDER * MONTH_LABEL + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_aug_dec_hrv
)

anova(model_hrv_gender_interact)

# ---- Pairwise comparisons: GENDER within MONTH ----
emmeans(model_hrv_gender_interact, pairwise ~ GENDER | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")

# ---- Pairwise comparisons: MONTH within GENDER ----
emmeans(model_hrv_gender_interact, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | GENDER, adjust = "holm")

# Add within-sex Aug→Dec brackets + interaction-p subtitle
p_s3d <- p_s3d + aug_dec_brackets_layer(
  model_hrv_gender_interact, df_aug_dec_hrv, y_var = "HRV",
  by_var = "GENDER", group_levels = c("female", "male"),
  interaction_term = "GENDER:MONTH_LABEL", by_label = "Sex"
)

# ---- Refit model without interaction ----
model_hrv_gender_main <- lmer(
  HRV ~ GENDER + MONTH_LABEL + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_aug_dec_hrv
)

# ---- Main effect significance ----
anova(model_hrv_gender_main)

# ---- Estimated marginal means ----
emmeans(model_hrv_gender_main, ~ GENDER)
emmeans(model_hrv_gender_main, ~ MONTH_LABEL)

```

## Sex Sensitivity: Age-Matched Subsample (Young + Middle only)
```{r}
# Motivation: female subsample is ~4 yrs younger on average and contains
# roughly half as many older adults as the male subsample. Although all
# primary models adjust for age, restrict here to the age-matched
# young + middle strata (3,000 per age x sex cell) to test whether the
# population-level sex signal survives a cleanly balanced comparison.

df_month_ym <- df_month %>% filter(AGE_BUCKET %in% c("Young", "Middle"))

# Confirm balance
df_month_ym %>% distinct(USER_ID, GENDER, AGE_BUCKET) %>% count(GENDER, AGE_BUCKET)

# ---- RHR: age-matched sex GAM + bootstrap ----
formula_rhr_sex_ym <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) +
  GENDER + AGE_2023 + BMI + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_sex_ym <- bam(formula_rhr_sex_ym, data = df_month_ym,
                        method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS, discrete = TRUE)

boot_rhr_sex_ym <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month_ym, formula_rhr_sex_ym, by = "GENDER")

bootstrap_summary_rhr_sex_ym <- boot_rhr_sex_ym %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low   = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high  = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_rhr_sex_ym <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_sex_ym, "GENDER")

# ---- HRV: age-matched sex GAM + bootstrap ----
formula_hrv_sex_ym <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = GENDER) +
  GENDER + AGE_2023 + BMI + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_sex_ym <- bam(formula_hrv_sex_ym, data = df_month_ym,
                        method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS, discrete = TRUE)

boot_hrv_sex_ym <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month_ym, formula_hrv_sex_ym, by = "GENDER")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_sex_ym <- boot_hrv_sex_ym %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low   = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high  = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_sex_ym <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_sex_ym, "GENDER")

# ---- Summary table: full sample vs age-matched subsample ----
sex_sensitivity <- bind_rows(
  bootstrap_summary_sex_rhr    %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR", Sample = "Full"),
  bootstrap_summary_rhr_sex_ym %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR", Sample = "Young+Middle"),
  bootstrap_summary_sex_hrv    %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV", Sample = "Full"),
  bootstrap_summary_hrv_sex_ym %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV", Sample = "Young+Middle")
)

sex_sensitivity_pvals <- bind_rows(
  boot_pvals_sex_rhr       %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR", Sample = "Full"),
  boot_pvals_rhr_sex_ym    %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR", Sample = "Young+Middle"),
  boot_pvals_sex_hrv       %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV", Sample = "Full"),
  boot_pvals_hrv_sex_ym    %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV", Sample = "Young+Middle")
)

print(sex_sensitivity)
print(sex_sensitivity_pvals)
```


# AIM 2
## Physical Activity
### RHR
```{r}
# Reuse baseline RHR model from Aim 1 (model_rhr_baseline)

# Adjusted model (with PA)
model_rhr_adj_pa <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- Extract smooth fits ----
v_base_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_rhr_baseline, data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Baseline")
v_adj_df  <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_rhr_adj_pa,  data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Adjusted")

plot_df <- bind_rows(v_base_df, v_adj_df)

# ---- Overlay plot (Figure 3d) ----
p_fig3d <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = Model, fill = Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "#1f78b4")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "#1f78b4")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig3d

# ---- Bootstrap attenuation ----
att_rhr_pa <- bootstrap_attenuation(
  df_month,
  formula_base = formula_rhr_baseline,
  formula_adj = RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w
)
att_summary_rhr_pa <- summarize_attenuation(att_rhr_pa)
```
### HRV
```{r}
# Reuse baseline HRV model from Aim 1 (model_hrv_baseline)

# Adjusted model (with PA)
model_hrv_adj_pa <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- Extract smooth fits ----
v_base_df_hrv <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_hrv_baseline, data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Baseline")
v_adj_df_hrv  <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_hrv_adj_pa,  data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Adjusted")

plot_df_hrv <- bind_rows(v_base_df_hrv, v_adj_df_hrv)

# ---- Overlay plot (Figure 3g) ----
p_fig3g <- ggplot(plot_df_hrv, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = Model, fill = Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "#1f78b4")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "#1f78b4")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig3g

# ---- Bootstrap attenuation ----
att_hrv_pa <- bootstrap_attenuation(
  df_month,
  formula_base = formula_hrv_baseline,
  formula_adj = HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w
)
att_summary_hrv_pa <- summarize_attenuation(att_hrv_pa)
```

## Sleep
### RHR
```{r}
# Reuse baseline RHR model from Aim 1 (model_rhr_baseline)

# Adjusted model (with sleep)
model_rhr_adj_sleep <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) +
    s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean +
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- Extract smooth fits ----
v_base_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_rhr_baseline, data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Baseline")
v_adj_df  <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_rhr_adj_sleep, data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Adjusted")

plot_df <- bind_rows(v_base_df, v_adj_df)

# ---- Overlay plot (Figure 3e) ----
p_fig3e <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = Model, fill = Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "darkorange")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "darkorange")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig3e

# ---- Bootstrap attenuation ----
att_rhr_sleep <- bootstrap_attenuation(
  df_month,
  formula_base = formula_rhr_baseline,
  formula_adj = RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w
)
att_summary_rhr_sleep <- summarize_attenuation(att_rhr_sleep)
```
### HRV
```{r}
# Reuse baseline HRV model from Aim 1 (model_hrv_baseline)

# Adjusted model (with sleep)
model_hrv_adj_sleep <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) +
    s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean +
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- Extract smooth fits ----
v_base_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_hrv_baseline, data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Baseline")
v_adj_df  <- predict_marginal_trajectory(model_hrv_adj_sleep, data = df_month) %>% mutate(Model = "Adjusted")

plot_df <- bind_rows(v_base_df, v_adj_df)

# ---- Overlay plot (Figure 3h) ----
p_fig3h <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = Model, fill = Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "darkorange")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "black", "Adjusted" = "darkorange")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig3h

# ---- Bootstrap attenuation ----
att_hrv_sleep <- bootstrap_attenuation(
  df_month,
  formula_base = formula_hrv_baseline,
  formula_adj = HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12) + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w
)
att_summary_hrv_sleep <- summarize_attenuation(att_hrv_sleep)
```

# AIM 3
### RHR
```{r}
# --- 1. Fit adjusted GAMM ---
model_rhr_age_alladj <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET +
    GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean +
    SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w +
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# --- 2. Extract smooths via marginal-trajectory helper ---
v_rhr_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_age_alladj,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET"
) %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

# Figure S5 panel A
p_s5a <- ggplot(v_rhr_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = AGE_BUCKET, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s5a

# ---- Bootstrap modeled amplitude by AGE_BUCKET (adjusted) ----
formula_rhr_age_adj <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET +
  GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean +
  SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w +
  MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w

boot_rhr_age_adj <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_rhr_age_adj, by = "AGE_BUCKET")

bootstrap_summary_rhr <- boot_rhr_age_adj %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_rhr <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_age_adj, "AGE_BUCKET")
```
### HRV
```{r}
model_hrv_age_alladj <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET +
    GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean +
    SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w +
    MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

v_hrv_df <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_age_alladj,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "AGE_BUCKET"
) %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

# Figure S5 panel B
p_s5b <- ggplot(v_hrv_df, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = AGE_BUCKET, fill = AGE_BUCKET)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age Group", values = age_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s5b

# ---- Bootstrap modeled amplitude by AGE_BUCKET (adjusted) ----
formula_hrv_age_adj <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET +
  GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean +
  SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w +
  MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_b + MINUTES_OF_SLEEP_w

boot_hrv_age_adj <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_hrv_age_adj, by = "AGE_BUCKET")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_adj <- boot_hrv_age_adj %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_adj <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_age_adj, "AGE_BUCKET")
```


# AIM 4
### AIM 4: Data Preparation (PA Tertiles + BMI Categories)
```{r}
# ---- 1. Add PA Tertiles to df_month (once; used by all PA analyses) ----
```
