```{r}
# Tertile is computed at the user level (one row per user) and joined back, so
# users whose SHRZS_b ties at a cutpoint are not split across two tertiles.
df_month <- df_month %>%
  select(-any_of("PA_TERTILE")) %>%
  mutate(
    AGE_BUCKET = as.factor(AGE_BUCKET),
    GENDER = as.factor(GENDER)
  )

user_pa <- df_month %>%
  distinct(USER_ID, SHRZS_b) %>%
  mutate(PA_TERTILE = factor(ntile(SHRZS_b, 3),
                             labels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))) %>%
  select(USER_ID, PA_TERTILE)  # drop SHRZS_b before join to avoid .x/.y collision

df_month <- df_month %>%
  select(-any_of(c("SHRZS_b.x", "SHRZS_b.y", "PA_TERTILE.x", "PA_TERTILE.y"))) %>%
  left_join(user_pa, by = "USER_ID")

# Verification: cell counts should total 16,415 (one row per user)
df_month %>%
  distinct(USER_ID, AGE_BUCKET, PA_TERTILE) %>%
  count(AGE_BUCKET, PA_TERTILE)

# ---- 2. Create df_month_bmi (separate copy; preserves df_month intact) ----
# Underweight (BMI < 18.5) and missing-BMI participants receive NA from
# case_when() and are dropped via drop_na() below.
df_month_bmi <- df_month %>%
  mutate(
    BMI_CATEGORY = case_when(
      BMI >= 18.5 & BMI < 25 ~ "Normal",
      BMI >= 25 & BMI < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      BMI >= 30 ~ "Obese"
    ),
    BMI_CATEGORY = factor(BMI_CATEGORY, levels = c("Normal", "Overweight", "Obese"))
  ) %>%
  drop_na(BMI_CATEGORY)
```

### RHR Moderation by Activity: All
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_rhr_pa_all <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_pa_all <- bam(
  formula_rhr_pa_all,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_pa_all <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_pa_all,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 4. Plot ----
p_fig4a <- ggplot(v_df_pa_all, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig4a

# ---- 5. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_rhr_pa_all <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_rhr_pa_all, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_pa_all <- boot_rhr_pa_all %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_pa_all <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_pa_all, "PA_TERTILE")
```

### HRV Moderation by Activity: All
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_hrv_pa_all <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + s(AGE_2023) + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_pa_all <- bam(
  formula_hrv_pa_all,
  data = df_month,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv_pa_all <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_pa_all,
  data = df_month,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 4. Plot ----
p_fig4b <- ggplot(v_df_hrv_pa_all, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig4b

# ---- 5. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_hrv_pa_all <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month, formula_hrv_pa_all, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_pa_all <- boot_hrv_pa_all %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_pa_all <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_pa_all, "PA_TERTILE")
```

### RHR Moderation by BMI: All
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY (uses df_month_bmi) ----
formula_rhr_bmi_all <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + s(AGE_2023) + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + GENDER + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_bmi_all <- bam(
  formula_rhr_bmi_all,
  data = df_month_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_bmi_all <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_bmi_all,
  data = df_month_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 4. Plot ----
p_fig4c <- ggplot(v_df_bmi_all, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig4c

# ---- 5. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_rhr_bmi_all <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month_bmi, formula_rhr_bmi_all, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_bmi_all <- boot_rhr_bmi_all %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_bmi_all <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_bmi_all, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```

### HRV Moderation by BMI: All
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY (uses df_month_bmi) ----
formula_hrv_bmi_all <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + s(AGE_2023) + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + GENDER + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_bmi_all <- bam(
  formula_hrv_bmi_all,
  data = df_month_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv_bmi_all <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_bmi_all,
  data = df_month_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 4. Plot ----
p_fig4d <- ggplot(v_df_hrv_bmi_all, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_fig4d

# ---- 5. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_hrv_bmi_all <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_month_bmi, formula_hrv_bmi_all, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_bmi_all <- boot_hrv_bmi_all %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_bmi_all <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_bmi_all, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```


### Geographic Daylight Amplitude: Regression + Figures
```{r}
# State-centroid latitudes (built-in to base R)
state_lat <- tibble::tibble(STATE = state.abb, LAT = state.center$y)

# Solar declination + daylight hours from latitude (degrees N) and day-of-year
solar_declination <- function(d) asin(0.39795 * cos(0.98563 * pi/180 * (d - 173)))
daylight_hours <- function(lat_deg, day_of_year) {
  phi   <- lat_deg * pi/180
  delta <- solar_declination(day_of_year)
  H     <- acos(pmin(pmax((-0.01454 - sin(phi) * sin(delta)) / (cos(phi) * cos(delta)),
                          -1), 1))
  2 * H * 180/pi / 15
}

# Annual daylight amplitude = summer solstice (day 173) − winter solstice (day 355)
state_lat <- state_lat %>%
  mutate(DAYLIGHT_AMP = daylight_hours(LAT, 173) - daylight_hours(LAT, 355))

# ---- User-level Aug/Dec amplitudes joined to daylight amplitude (RHR) ----
df_amp_rhr_lat <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = ifelse(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "December")) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_val = mean(RHR_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    STATE = first(na.omit(STATE)),
    AGE_2023 = first(AGE_2023),
    GENDER = first(GENDER),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    RHR_person_mean = first(RHR_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_val) %>%
  mutate(amplitude = December - August) %>%
  left_join(state_lat, by = "STATE") %>%
  drop_na(DAYLIGHT_AMP, amplitude)

# ---- User-level Aug/Dec amplitudes joined to daylight amplitude (HRV) ----
df_amp_hrv_lat <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = ifelse(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "December")) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_val = mean(HRV_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    STATE = first(na.omit(STATE)),
    AGE_2023 = first(AGE_2023),
    GENDER = first(GENDER),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    HRV_person_mean = first(HRV_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_val) %>%
  mutate(amplitude = August - December) %>%
  left_join(state_lat, by = "STATE") %>%
  drop_na(DAYLIGHT_AMP, amplitude)

# ---- Linear regressions: amplitude ~ annual daylight amplitude + covariates ----
model_rhr_daylight <- lm(amplitude ~ DAYLIGHT_AMP + AGE_2023 + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean,
                         data = df_amp_rhr_lat)
model_hrv_daylight <- lm(amplitude ~ DAYLIGHT_AMP + AGE_2023 + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
                         data = df_amp_hrv_lat)

# Extract daylight-amplitude coefficient, CI, and p-value for reporting
daylight_results <- tibble::tibble(
  Outcome       = c("RHR", "HRV"),
  beta_daylight = c(coef(model_rhr_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP"],
                    coef(model_hrv_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP"]),
  ci_low        = c(confint(model_rhr_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 1],
                    confint(model_hrv_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 1]),
  ci_high       = c(confint(model_rhr_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 2],
                    confint(model_hrv_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 2]),
  p_value       = c(summary(model_rhr_daylight)$coefficients["DAYLIGHT_AMP", "Pr(>|t|)"],
                    summary(model_hrv_daylight)$coefficients["DAYLIGHT_AMP", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
  n             = c(nrow(df_amp_rhr_lat), nrow(df_amp_hrv_lat))
)
print(daylight_results)

# ---- Sensitivity: cluster-robust SEs by state ----
# DAYLIGHT_AMP is identical for all users in a state, so OLS treats clustered
# observations as independent. Cluster-robust standard errors (sandwich
# estimator) account for within-state correlation without imposing
# distributional assumptions on state-level effects.
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)

vcov_cluster_rhr <- vcovCL(model_rhr_daylight, cluster = ~ STATE)
vcov_cluster_hrv <- vcovCL(model_hrv_daylight, cluster = ~ STATE)

coeftest_rhr_cluster <- coeftest(model_rhr_daylight, vcov = vcov_cluster_rhr)
coeftest_hrv_cluster <- coeftest(model_hrv_daylight, vcov = vcov_cluster_hrv)

ci_rhr_cluster <- coefci(model_rhr_daylight, vcov = vcov_cluster_rhr)
ci_hrv_cluster <- coefci(model_hrv_daylight, vcov = vcov_cluster_hrv)

daylight_results_cluster <- tibble::tibble(
  Outcome       = c("RHR", "HRV"),
  beta_daylight = c(coef(model_rhr_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP"],
                    coef(model_hrv_daylight)["DAYLIGHT_AMP"]),
  ci_low        = c(ci_rhr_cluster["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 1],
                    ci_hrv_cluster["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 1]),
  ci_high       = c(ci_rhr_cluster["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 2],
                    ci_hrv_cluster["DAYLIGHT_AMP", 2]),
  p_value       = c(coeftest_rhr_cluster["DAYLIGHT_AMP", "Pr(>|t|)"],
                    coeftest_hrv_cluster["DAYLIGHT_AMP", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
  n_users       = c(nrow(df_amp_rhr_lat), nrow(df_amp_hrv_lat)),
  n_states      = c(length(unique(df_amp_rhr_lat$STATE)), length(unique(df_amp_hrv_lat$STATE)))
)
print(daylight_results_cluster)

# Side-by-side comparison: OLS vs cluster-robust SEs (same coefficients, different SEs)
daylight_comparison <- bind_rows(
  daylight_results            %>% select(Outcome, beta_daylight, ci_low, ci_high, p_value) %>% mutate(SE_method = "OLS"),
  daylight_results_cluster    %>% select(Outcome, beta_daylight, ci_low, ci_high, p_value) %>% mutate(SE_method = "Cluster-robust (state)")
) %>%
  select(SE_method, Outcome, beta_daylight, ci_low, ci_high, p_value)
print(daylight_comparison)

# ---- State-level summaries for plotting (one point per state, sized by n) ----
state_summary_rhr <- df_amp_rhr_lat %>%
  group_by(STATE, DAYLIGHT_AMP) %>%
  summarise(mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_users = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

state_summary_hrv <- df_amp_hrv_lat %>%
  group_by(STATE, DAYLIGHT_AMP) %>%
  summarise(mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_users = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

# ---- Cluster-robust prediction grids for plotting ----
# Build prediction grids with DAYLIGHT_AMP varying and other covariates at
# sample means (GENDER at reference level "male"). Cluster-robust pointwise
# SEs computed via X %*% vcovCL %*% X'.

# RHR
pred_rhr <- data.frame(
  DAYLIGHT_AMP    = seq(min(df_amp_rhr_lat$DAYLIGHT_AMP),
                        max(df_amp_rhr_lat$DAYLIGHT_AMP), length.out = 200),
  AGE_2023        = mean(df_amp_rhr_lat$AGE_2023, na.rm = TRUE),
  GENDER          = factor(levels(df_amp_rhr_lat$GENDER)[1],
                           levels = levels(df_amp_rhr_lat$GENDER)),
  BMI             = mean(df_amp_rhr_lat$BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
  RHR_person_mean = mean(df_amp_rhr_lat$RHR_person_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)
X_rhr <- model.matrix(~ DAYLIGHT_AMP + AGE_2023 + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean,
                      data = pred_rhr)
pred_rhr$fit <- as.vector(X_rhr %*% coef(model_rhr_daylight))
pred_rhr$se  <- sqrt(diag(X_rhr %*% vcov_cluster_rhr %*% t(X_rhr)))
pred_rhr$lwr <- pred_rhr$fit - 1.96 * pred_rhr$se
pred_rhr$upr <- pred_rhr$fit + 1.96 * pred_rhr$se

# HRV
pred_hrv <- data.frame(
  DAYLIGHT_AMP    = seq(min(df_amp_hrv_lat$DAYLIGHT_AMP),
                        max(df_amp_hrv_lat$DAYLIGHT_AMP), length.out = 200),
  AGE_2023        = mean(df_amp_hrv_lat$AGE_2023, na.rm = TRUE),
  GENDER          = factor(levels(df_amp_hrv_lat$GENDER)[1],
                           levels = levels(df_amp_hrv_lat$GENDER)),
  BMI             = mean(df_amp_hrv_lat$BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
  HRV_person_mean = mean(df_amp_hrv_lat$HRV_person_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)
X_hrv <- model.matrix(~ DAYLIGHT_AMP + AGE_2023 + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
                      data = pred_hrv)
pred_hrv$fit <- as.vector(X_hrv %*% coef(model_hrv_daylight))
pred_hrv$se  <- sqrt(diag(X_hrv %*% vcov_cluster_hrv %*% t(X_hrv)))
pred_hrv$lwr <- pred_hrv$fit - 1.96 * pred_hrv$se
pred_hrv$upr <- pred_hrv$fit + 1.96 * pred_hrv$se

# ---- Figure S5A (saved as S5; internal name p_s9a per creation order) ----
# Caption note: points are state-level means (sized by n users); regression
# line and 95% CI are from a user-level model with state-clustered SEs.
p_s9a <- ggplot(state_summary_rhr, aes(x = DAYLIGHT_AMP, y = mean_amp)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_rhr, aes(x = DAYLIGHT_AMP, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
              fill = "#D62728", alpha = 0.25, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_line(data = pred_rhr, aes(x = DAYLIGHT_AMP, y = fit),
            color = "#D62728", linewidth = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_users), alpha = 0.75, color = "gray25") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N per State", range = c(1.5, 8)) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Annual Daylight Amplitude (h)") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Amplitude (Dec − Aug, bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s9a

# ---- Figure S5B (saved as S5; internal name p_s9b per creation order) ----
p_s9b <- ggplot(state_summary_hrv, aes(x = DAYLIGHT_AMP, y = mean_amp)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_hrv, aes(x = DAYLIGHT_AMP, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
              fill = "#1F77B4", alpha = 0.25, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_line(data = pred_hrv, aes(x = DAYLIGHT_AMP, y = fit),
            color = "#1F77B4", linewidth = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_users), alpha = 0.75, color = "gray25") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N per State", range = c(1.5, 8)) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Annual Daylight Amplitude (h)") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Amplitude (Aug − Dec, ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s9b
```


### Old Adults: Create Subsets
```{r}
# ---- Create df_old ONCE (PA analyses) ----
df_old <- df_month %>%
  filter(AGE_BUCKET == "Old")

# ---- Create df_old_bmi ONCE (BMI analyses) ----
df_old_bmi <- df_month_bmi %>%
  filter(AGE_BUCKET == "Old")
```

### RHR Moderation by Activity: Old
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_rhr_pa_old <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_pa_old <- bam(
  formula_rhr_pa_old,
  data = df_old,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_pa <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_pa_old,
  data = df_old,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 5. Plot ----
p_s8_rhr_pa <- ggplot(v_df_pa, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_rhr_pa

# ---- 6. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_rhr_pa_old <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_old, formula_rhr_pa_old, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_pa_old <- boot_rhr_pa_old %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_pa_old <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_pa_old, "PA_TERTILE")

# ---- 7. Plot Bootstrapped Amplitude by PA_TERTILE ----
bootstrap_summary_pa_old$PA_TERTILE <- factor(bootstrap_summary_pa_old$PA_TERTILE, levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))

p_s8_rhr_pa_amp <- ggplot(bootstrap_summary_pa_old, aes(x = PA_TERTILE, y = mean_amp, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.2, linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pa_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Physical Activity Tertile (Older Adults)",
    y = "Modeled RHR Amplitude (bpm)"
  ) +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)
p_s8_rhr_pa_amp
```

### HRV Moderation by Activity: Old
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_hrv_pa_old <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_pa_old <- bam(
  formula_hrv_pa_old,
  data = df_old,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_pa_old,
  data = df_old,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 5. Plot ----
p_s8_hrv_pa <- ggplot(v_df_hrv, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_hrv_pa

# ---- 6. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_hrv_pa_old <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_old, formula_hrv_pa_old, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_pa_old <- boot_hrv_pa_old %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_pa_old <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_pa_old, "PA_TERTILE")
```

### RHR Moderation by BMI: Old
```{r}
df_old_bmi %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(n_users = n_distinct(USER_ID), .groups = "drop")

# ---- 2. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY ----
formula_rhr_bmi_old <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_bmi_old <- bam(
  formula_rhr_bmi_old,
  data = df_old_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 3. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_bmi <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_bmi_old,
  data = df_old_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 4. Plot ----
p_s8_rhr_bmi <- ggplot(v_df_bmi, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_rhr_bmi

# ---- 5. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_rhr_bmi_old <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_old_bmi, formula_rhr_bmi_old, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_bmi_old <- boot_rhr_bmi_old %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_bmi_old <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_bmi_old, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```

### RHR Moderation by BMI: Old (Plotting Only; No Overweight)
```{r}
df_old_bmi_no <- df_old_bmi %>%
  filter(BMI_CATEGORY %in% c("Normal", "Obese")) %>%
  mutate(BMI_CATEGORY = factor(BMI_CATEGORY, levels = c("Normal", "Obese")))

# Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY
model_rhr_bmi_noow <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
    BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + BMI + RHR_person_mean,
  data = df_old_bmi_no,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE)
v_df_bmi_noow <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_bmi_noow,
  data = df_old_bmi_no,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# Plot
p_s8_rhr_bmi_noow <- ggplot(v_df_bmi_noow, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors[c("Normal", "Obese")]) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors[c("Normal", "Obese")]) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_rhr_bmi_noow
```

### HRV Moderation by BMI: Old
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY (reuses df_old_bmi) ----
formula_hrv_bmi_old <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_bmi_old <- bam(
  formula_hrv_bmi_old,
  data = df_old_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv_bmi <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_bmi_old,
  data = df_old_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 3. Plot ----
p_s8_hrv_bmi <- ggplot(v_df_hrv_bmi, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_hrv_bmi

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_hrv_bmi_old <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_old_bmi, formula_hrv_bmi_old, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_bmi_old <- boot_hrv_bmi_old %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_bmi_old <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_bmi_old, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```

### HRV Moderation by BMI: Old (Plotting Only; No Overweight)
```{r}
# ---- Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY (reuses df_old_bmi_no from RHR section) ----
model_hrv_bmi_noow <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
    BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
  data = df_old_bmi_no,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 3. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv_bmi_noow <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_bmi_noow,
  data = df_old_bmi_no,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 4. Plot ----
p_s8_hrv_bmi_noow <- ggplot(v_df_hrv_bmi_noow, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors[c("Normal", "Obese")]) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors[c("Normal", "Obese")]) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_hrv_bmi_noow
```
### RHR Box-And-Whisker and LMM by BMI Category: Old
```{r}
df_old_bmi_aug_dec <- df_old_bmi %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(
    MONTH_LABEL = factor(ifelse(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "December"), levels = c("August", "December")),
    pattern = ifelse(MONTH_LABEL == "December", "stripe", "none")
  )

# Boxplot
p_s8_rhr_bmi_box <- ggplot(df_old_bmi_aug_dec, aes(x = BMI_CATEGORY, y = RESTING_HEART_RATE)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = BMI_CATEGORY,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = BMI_CATEGORY
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, BMI_CATEGORY)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "BMI Category",
    y = "Resting Heart Rate (bpm)"
  ) +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_rhr_bmi_box

# LMM for RHR with BMI_CATEGORY * MONTH_LABEL interaction
model_old_rhr_bmi <- lmer(
  RESTING_HEART_RATE ~ BMI_CATEGORY * MONTH_LABEL + PA_TERTILE + GENDER + RHR_person_mean + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_old_bmi_aug_dec
)

anova(model_old_rhr_bmi)

emmeans(model_old_rhr_bmi, pairwise ~ BMI_CATEGORY | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")
emmeans(model_old_rhr_bmi, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | BMI_CATEGORY, adjust = "holm")
```
### HRV Box-And-Whisker and LMM by BMI Category: Old
```{r}
# Reuse df_old_bmi_aug_dec from prior chunk

p_s8_hrv_bmi_box <- ggplot(df_old_bmi_aug_dec, aes(x = BMI_CATEGORY, y = HRV)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = BMI_CATEGORY,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = BMI_CATEGORY
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, BMI_CATEGORY)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "BMI Category",
    y = "HRV (ms)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 150)) +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s8_hrv_bmi_box

model_old_hrv_bmi <- lmer(
  HRV ~ BMI_CATEGORY * MONTH_LABEL + GENDER + PA_TERTILE + HRV_person_mean + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_old_bmi_aug_dec
)

anova(model_old_hrv_bmi)
emmeans(model_old_hrv_bmi, pairwise ~ BMI_CATEGORY | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")
emmeans(model_old_hrv_bmi, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | BMI_CATEGORY, adjust = "holm")

```
### Means+/-SD in BMI categories: Old
```{r}
df_old_bmi %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    n_users = n_distinct(USER_ID),
    mean_BMI = mean(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_BMI = sd(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AGE_2023 = mean(AGE_2023, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_AGE_2023 = sd(AGE_2023, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

### Middle-Aged Adults: Create Subsets
```{r}
# ---- Create df_mid ONCE (PA analyses) ----
# Inherits whole-sample, user-level PA_TERTILE from df_month (lines 2504-2509)
# so Low/Moderate/High refer to the same absolute activity levels across all
# age strata (df_old, df_mid, df_young).
df_mid <- df_month %>%
  filter(AGE_BUCKET == "Middle")

# ---- Create df_mid_bmi ONCE (BMI analyses) ----
df_mid_bmi <- df_month_bmi %>%
  filter(AGE_BUCKET == "Middle")
```

### RHR Moderation by Activity: Middle
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_rhr_pa_mid <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_pa_mid <- bam(
  formula_rhr_pa_mid,
  data = df_mid,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_pa <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_pa_mid,
  data = df_mid,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 3. Plot (Figure S7: RHR by PA, Middle-Aged) ----
p_s7_rhr_pa <- ggplot(v_df_pa, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s7_rhr_pa

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_rhr_pa_mid <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_mid, formula_rhr_pa_mid, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_pa_mid <- boot_rhr_pa_mid %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_pa_mid <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_pa_mid, "PA_TERTILE")
```

### HRV Moderation by Activity: Middle
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_hrv_pa_mid <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_pa_mid <- bam(
  formula_hrv_pa_mid,
  data = df_mid,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_pa_hrv <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_pa_mid,
  data = df_mid,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 3. Plot (Figure S7: HRV by PA, Middle-Aged) ----
p_s7_hrv_pa <- ggplot(v_df_pa_hrv, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s7_hrv_pa

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_hrv_pa_mid <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_mid, formula_hrv_pa_mid, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_pa_mid <- boot_hrv_pa_mid %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_pa_mid <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_pa_mid, "PA_TERTILE")
```

### RHR Moderation by BMI: Middle
```{r}
# ---- 1. Sample sizes by BMI group ----
df_mid_bmi %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(n_users = n_distinct(USER_ID), .groups = "drop")

# ---- 2. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY ----
formula_rhr_bmi_mid <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_bmi_mid <- bam(
  formula_rhr_bmi_mid,
  data = df_mid_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 3. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_bmi_mid <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_bmi_mid,
  data = df_mid_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 4. Plot (Figure S7: RHR by BMI, Middle-Aged) ----
p_s7_rhr_bmi <- ggplot(v_df_bmi_mid, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s7_rhr_bmi

# ---- 5. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_rhr_bmi_mid <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_mid_bmi, formula_rhr_bmi_mid, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_bmi_mid <- boot_rhr_bmi_mid %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_bmi_mid <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_bmi_mid, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```

### HRV Moderation by BMI: Middle
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY ----
formula_hrv_bmi_mid <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_bmi_mid <- bam(
  formula_hrv_bmi_mid,
  data = df_mid_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_bmi_mid <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_bmi_mid,
  data = df_mid_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 3. Plot (Figure S7: HRV by BMI, Middle-Aged) ----
p_s7_hrv_bmi <- ggplot(v_df_bmi_mid, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s7_hrv_bmi

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_hrv_bmi_mid <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_mid_bmi, formula_hrv_bmi_mid, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_bmi_mid <- boot_hrv_bmi_mid %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_bmi_mid <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_bmi_mid, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```


### Young Adults: Create Subsets
```{r}
# ---- Create df_young ONCE (PA analyses) ----
df_young <- df_month %>%
  filter(AGE_BUCKET == "Young")

# ---- Create df_young_bmi ONCE (BMI analyses) ----
df_young_bmi <- df_month_bmi %>%
  filter(AGE_BUCKET == "Young")
```

### RHR Moderation by Activity: Young
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_rhr_pa_young <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_pa_y <- bam(
  formula_rhr_pa_young,
  data = df_young,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_pa_y <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_pa_y,
  data = df_young,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 3. Plot ----
p_s6_rhr_pa <- ggplot(v_df_pa_y, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s6_rhr_pa

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_rhr_pa_young <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_young, formula_rhr_pa_young, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_pa_y <- boot_rhr_pa_young %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_pa_y <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_pa_young, "PA_TERTILE")

# ---- 5. Plot Bootstrapped Amplitude by PA_TERTILE ----
bootstrap_summary_pa_y$PA_TERTILE <- factor(bootstrap_summary_pa_y$PA_TERTILE, levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))

p_s6_rhr_pa_amp <- ggplot(bootstrap_summary_pa_y, aes(x = PA_TERTILE, y = mean_amp, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.2, linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pa_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Physical Activity Tertile (Young Adults)",
    y = "Modeled RHR Amplitude (bpm)"
  ) +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)
p_s6_rhr_pa_amp
```

### HRV Moderation by Activity: Young
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM for HRV with cyclic spline by PA_TERTILE ----
formula_hrv_pa_young <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = PA_TERTILE) +
  PA_TERTILE + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_pa_y <- bam(
  formula_hrv_pa_young,
  data = df_young,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv_y <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_pa_y,
  data = df_young,
  by_var = "PA_TERTILE"
)

# ---- 3. Plot ----
p_s6_hrv_pa <- ggplot(v_df_hrv_y, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = PA_TERTILE, fill = PA_TERTILE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Activity Group", values = pa_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s6_hrv_pa

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise ----
boot_hrv_pa_young <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_young, formula_hrv_pa_young, by = "PA_TERTILE")

bootstrap_summary_hrv_y <- boot_hrv_pa_young %>%
  group_by(PA_TERTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_hrv_y <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_pa_young, "PA_TERTILE")
```

### RHR Moderation by BMI: Young
```{r}
# Count participants in each BMI category
df_young_bmi %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(n_users = n_distinct(USER_ID), .groups = "drop")

# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY ----
formula_rhr_bmi_young <- RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + RHR_person_mean

model_rhr_bmi_young <- bam(
  formula_rhr_bmi_young,
  data = df_young_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_bmi_young <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_bmi_young,
  data = df_young_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 3. Plot ----
p_s6_rhr_bmi <- ggplot(v_df_bmi_young, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s6_rhr_bmi

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_rhr_bmi_young <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_young_bmi, formula_rhr_bmi_young, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_bmi_young <- boot_rhr_bmi_young %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_bmi_young <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_rhr_bmi_young, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```

### RHR Moderation by BMI: Young (Plotting Only; No Overweight)
```{r}
df_young_bmi_no <- df_young_bmi %>%
  filter(BMI_CATEGORY %in% c("Normal", "Obese")) %>%
  mutate(BMI_CATEGORY = factor(BMI_CATEGORY, levels = c("Normal", "Obese")))

# Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY
model_rhr_bmi_young_no <- bam(
  RHR_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
    BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + BMI + RHR_person_mean,
  data = df_young_bmi_no,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE)
v_df_bmi_young_no <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_rhr_bmi_young_no,
  data = df_young_bmi_no,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

bmi_colors_no <- c("Normal" = "#4daf4a", "Obese" = "#e41a1c")

# Plot
ggplot(v_df_bmi_young_no, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors_no) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors_no) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "RHR Offset (bpm)") +
  theme_seasonality()
```

### HRV Moderation by BMI: Young
```{r}
# ---- 1. Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY ----
formula_hrv_bmi_young <- HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
  BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + SHRZS_b + SHRZS_w + HRV_person_mean

model_hrv_bmi_young <- bam(
  formula_hrv_bmi_young,
  data = df_young_bmi,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 2. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_bmi_hrv_young <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_bmi_young,
  data = df_young_bmi,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

# ---- 3. Plot ----
p_s6_hrv_bmi <- ggplot(v_df_bmi_hrv_young, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s6_hrv_bmi

# ---- 4. Bootstrap amplitude + pairwise (formula matches primary model) ----
boot_hrv_bmi_young <- bootstrap_amplitude(df_young_bmi, formula_hrv_bmi_young, by = "BMI_CATEGORY")

bootstrap_summary_bmi_hrv_young <- boot_hrv_bmi_young %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

boot_pvals_bmi_hrv_young <- bootstrap_pairwise(boot_hrv_bmi_young, "BMI_CATEGORY")
```

### HRV Moderation by BMI: Young (Plotting Only; No Overweight)
```{r}
# ---- Fit GAMM with cyclic spline by BMI_CATEGORY (reuses df_young_bmi_no from RHR section) ----
model_hrv_bmi_young_no <- bam(
  HRV_within ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = BMI_CATEGORY) +
    BMI_CATEGORY + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean,
  data = df_young_bmi_no,
  method = "fREML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS,
  discrete = TRUE
)

# ---- 3. Marginal trajectory (averages over GENDER; lpmatrix-based SE) ----
v_df_hrv_bmi_young_no <- predict_marginal_trajectory(
  model_hrv_bmi_young_no,
  data = df_young_bmi_no,
  by_var = "BMI_CATEGORY"
)

bmi_colors_no <- c("Normal" = "#4daf4a", "Obese" = "#e41a1c")

# ---- 4. Plot ----
ggplot(v_df_hrv_bmi_young_no, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit, color = BMI_CATEGORY, fill = BMI_CATEGORY)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors_no) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "BMI Group", values = bmi_colors_no) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "HRV Offset (ms)") +
  theme_seasonality()
```

### RHR Box-And-Whisker and LMM by BMI Category: Young
```{r}
# Subset young adults for Aug/Dec comparison
df_young_bmi_aug_dec <- df_young_bmi %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(
    MONTH_LABEL = factor(ifelse(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "December"), levels = c("August", "December")),
    pattern = ifelse(MONTH_LABEL == "December", "stripe", "none")
  )

# Plot
p_s6_rhr_box <- ggplot(df_young_bmi_aug_dec, aes(x = BMI_CATEGORY, y = RESTING_HEART_RATE)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = BMI_CATEGORY,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = BMI_CATEGORY
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, BMI_CATEGORY)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "BMI Category",
    y = "Resting Heart Rate (bpm)"
  ) +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s6_rhr_box

# Linear Mixed Model
model_young_rhr_bmi <- lmer(
  RESTING_HEART_RATE ~ BMI_CATEGORY * MONTH_LABEL + GENDER + PA_TERTILE + RHR_person_mean + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_young_bmi_aug_dec
)

# Model ANOVA
anova(model_young_rhr_bmi)

# BMI category differences within each month
emmeans(model_young_rhr_bmi, pairwise ~ BMI_CATEGORY | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")

# Month differences within each BMI category
emmeans(model_young_rhr_bmi, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | BMI_CATEGORY, adjust = "holm")
```

### HRV Box-And-Whisker and LMM by BMI Category: Young
```{r}
# Plot
p_s6_hrv_box <- ggplot(df_young_bmi_aug_dec, aes(x = BMI_CATEGORY, y = HRV)) +
  geom_boxplot_pattern(
    aes(
      fill = BMI_CATEGORY,
      pattern = MONTH_LABEL,
      pattern_fill = BMI_CATEGORY
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    color = "black",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    aes(group = interaction(MONTH_LABEL, BMI_CATEGORY)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_fill_manual(values = bmi_colors) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("August" = "none", "December" = "stripe"),
    name = "Month"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    pattern_fill = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "BMI Category",
    y = "HRV (ms)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 150)) +
  theme_seasonality()
p_s6_hrv_box

# Linear Mixed Model for HRV (same structure as RHR model)
model_young_hrv_bmi <- lmer(
  HRV ~ BMI_CATEGORY * MONTH_LABEL + GENDER + PA_TERTILE + HRV_person_mean + (1 | USER_ID),
  data = df_young_bmi_aug_dec
)

# Type III ANOVA for fixed effects
anova(model_young_hrv_bmi)

emmeans(model_young_hrv_bmi, pairwise ~ BMI_CATEGORY | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")
emmeans(model_young_hrv_bmi, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | BMI_CATEGORY, adjust = "holm")
```

### Means+/-SD in BMI categories: Young
```{r}
df_young_bmi %>%
  group_by(BMI_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    n_users = n_distinct(USER_ID),
    mean_BMI = mean(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_BMI = sd(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AGE_2023 = mean(AGE_2023, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_AGE_2023 = sd(AGE_2023, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


### Monthly summary of physical activity and sleep
```{r}
df_behavior_monthly <- df_month %>%
  group_by(MONTH_NUM) %>%
  summarise(
    Sleep = mean(MINUTES_OF_SLEEP, na.rm = TRUE),
    SHRZS = mean(SHRZS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(-MONTH_NUM, names_to = "Behavior", values_to = "Value")

ggplot(df_behavior_monthly, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = Value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Behavior, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(
               Sleep = "Sleep Duration (min/night)",
               SHRZS = "Physical Activity (SHRZS)"
             ))) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

### Behavioral Seasonal Trajectories (Figures 3a–c)
```{r}
# 1. Fit cyclic GAMs
model_sleep <- gam(MINUTES_OF_SLEEP ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12),
                   data = df_month, method = "REML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS)

model_activity <- gam(SHRZS ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12),
                      data = df_month, method = "REML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS)

# 2. Extract smooth fits with visreg
vis_sleep <- visreg(model_sleep, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", plot = FALSE)
vis_activity <- visreg(model_activity, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", plot = FALSE)

# 3. Build tidy data frames for plotting
df_sleep <- vis_sleep$fit %>%
  mutate(Behavior = "Sleep Duration (min/night)")

df_activity <- vis_activity$fit %>%
  mutate(Behavior = "Physical Activity (SHRZS)")

# 4. Define custom colors
behavior_colors <- c(
  "Sleep Duration (min/night)" = "#fc8d62",     # Orange
  "Physical Activity (SHRZS)" = "#1f78b4"       # Blue
)

# 5. Plot each behavior separately (Figure 3a-b)

# --- Sleep (Figure 3b) ---
p_fig3b <- ggplot(df_sleep, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit)) +
  geom_line(color = behavior_colors["Sleep Duration (min/night)"], linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr),
              fill = behavior_colors["Sleep Duration (min/night)"], alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  ylab("Sleep Duration (min/night)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)

# --- Activity (Figure 3a) ---
p_fig3a <- ggplot(df_activity, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit)) +
  geom_line(color = behavior_colors["Physical Activity (SHRZS)"], linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr),
              fill = behavior_colors["Physical Activity (SHRZS)"], alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
  ylab("Physical Activity (SHRZS)") +
  theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)

p_fig3a
p_fig3b

get_peak_nadir <- function(df, behavior_label) {
  df <- df %>% mutate(Behavior = behavior_label)

  peak <- df[which.max(df$visregFit), ]
  nadir <- df[which.min(df$visregFit), ]

  bind_rows(
    peak = peak,
    nadir = nadir,
    .id = "Extreme"
  )
}

extremes_sleep <- get_peak_nadir(df_sleep, "Sleep Duration (min/night)")
extremes_activity <- get_peak_nadir(df_activity, "Physical Activity (SHRZS)")

all_extremes <- bind_rows(
  extremes_sleep,
  extremes_activity
)

# Add readable month name
all_extremes <- all_extremes %>%
  mutate(Month = month.abb[MONTH_NUM]) %>%
  select(Behavior, Extreme, MONTH_NUM, Month, visregFit)
```

```{r}
# Add AGE_BUCKET as factor to ensure consistent ordering
df_month <- df_month %>%
  mutate(AGE_BUCKET = factor(AGE_BUCKET, levels = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")))

# 1. Fit cyclic models by AGE_BUCKET
model_sleep <- gam(
  MINUTES_OF_SLEEP ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET,
  data = df_month, method = "REML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS
)

model_activity <- gam(
  SHRZS ~ s(MONTH_NUM, bs = "cc", k = 12, by = AGE_BUCKET) + AGE_BUCKET,
  data = df_month, method = "REML", knots = MONTH_KNOTS
)

vis_sleep <- visreg(model_sleep, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", by = "AGE_BUCKET",
                    overlay = FALSE, plot = FALSE)

vis_activity <- visreg(model_activity, xvar = "MONTH_NUM", by = "AGE_BUCKET",
                       overlay = FALSE, plot = FALSE)

df_sleep_age <- vis_sleep$fit %>%
  mutate(Behavior = "Sleep Duration (min/night)")

df_activity_age <- vis_activity$fit %>%
  mutate(Behavior = "Physical Activity (SHRZS)")

age_linetypes <- c(
  "Young" = "solid",
  "Middle" = "dashed",
  "Old" = "dotted"
)

plot_behavior <- function(df_behavior, color) {
  ggplot(df_behavior, aes(x = MONTH_NUM, y = visregFit,
                          linetype = AGE_BUCKET)) +
    geom_line(color = color, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = visregLwr, ymax = visregUpr),
                fill = color, alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = age_linetypes) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb, name = NULL) +
    labs(x = "Month",
         y = unique(df_behavior$Behavior)) +
    theme_seasonality(legend = FALSE)
}

# Figure S4: age-stratified behavioral seasonal curves
p_s4b <- plot_behavior(df_sleep_age,
                       behavior_colors["Sleep Duration (min/night)"])

p_s4a <- plot_behavior(df_activity_age,
                       behavior_colors["Physical Activity (SHRZS)"])

p_s4a
p_s4b

legend_df <- data.frame(
  AGE_BUCKET = c("Young", "Middle", "Old"),
  x = c(1, 4, 7),
  xend = c(2.5, 5.5, 8.5),
  y = 1,
  Label = c("Young", "Middle", "Old")
)

age_bucket_legend_horizontal <- ggplot(legend_df) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y, linetype = AGE_BUCKET),
    color = "black", linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(x = xend + 0.3, y = y, label = Label),
    hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, fontface = "bold", size = 5
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = age_linetypes) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.5, 10), ylim = c(0.5, 1.5), clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
  )

age_bucket_legend_horizontal
```

### Assemble Multi-Panel Figures
```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=12}
# Assembles Figures 1-4 from component plots created above and writes PDF+PNG to the Main Figures directory.
fig_dir <- "/Users/gregory.grosicki/Desktop/Seasonality/Main Figures"
sup_dir <- "/Users/gregory.grosicki/Desktop/Seasonality/Supplementary Figures"

# ---- Figure 1: RHR and HRV by Age Group (2x2) ----
fig1 <- ((p_fig1a + p_fig1b) / (p_fig1c + p_fig1d)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig1
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_1.pdf"), fig1, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_1.png"), fig1, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure 2: RHR and HRV by Sex (2x2) ----
fig2 <- ((p_fig2a + p_fig2b) / (p_fig2c + p_fig2d)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig2
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_2.pdf"), fig2, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_2.png"), fig2, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure 3: Behavioral Attenuation (3x3) ----
fig3_theme <- theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
                    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

fig3 <- ((p_fig3a + fig3_theme) + (p_fig3b + fig3_theme)) /
        ((p_fig3d + fig3_theme) + (p_fig3e + fig3_theme)) /
        ((p_fig3g + fig3_theme) + (p_fig3h + fig3_theme)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"))
fig3
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_3.pdf"), fig3, width = 16, height = 14, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_3.png"), fig3, width = 16, height = 14, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure 4: PA Level and BMI Moderation (2x2) ----
fig4 <- ((p_fig4a + p_fig4b) / (p_fig4c + p_fig4d)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig4
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_4.pdf"), fig4, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure_4.png"), fig4, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

### Supplementary Figure Assembly (Figures S1–S9)
```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=12}
# ---- Figure S1: Overall RHR and HRV (1x2) ----
fig_s1 <- (p_s1a + p_s1b) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s1
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S1.pdf"), fig_s1, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S1.png"), fig_s1, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S2: RHR and HRV by Age – GAMM + Box-Whisker (2x2) ----
fig_s2 <- ((p_s2a + p_s2b) / (p_s2c + p_s2d)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s2
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S2.pdf"), fig_s2, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S2.png"), fig_s2, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S3: RHR and HRV by Sex – GAMM + Box-Whisker (2x2) ----
fig_s3 <- ((p_s3a + p_s3b) / (p_s3c + p_s3d)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s3
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S3.pdf"), fig_s3, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S3.png"), fig_s3, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S4: Behavioral Patterns by Age Group (1x2) ----
fig_s4 <- (p_s4a + p_s4b + plot_layout(ncol = 2)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s4
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S4.pdf"), fig_s4, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S4.png"), fig_s4, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# NOTE: After integrating photoperiod into the behavioral-mediation narrative,
# photoperiod (previously S9) becomes the new Figure S5 (appears first in text),
# age-stratified all-adjusted becomes the new Figure S6, and the Aim-3 age-stratified
# moderation figures are S7/S8/S9. Internal R object names (fig_s5, fig_s6, fig_s7,
# fig_s8, fig_s9) reflect original creation order; saved filenames reflect final
# numbering.

# ---- Figure S5 (new): RHR and HRV amplitude vs annual daylight amplitude (1x2) ----
fig_s9 <- (p_s9a + p_s9b) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s9
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S5.pdf"), fig_s9, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S5.png"), fig_s9, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S6 (new): Adjusted RHR and HRV by Age (1x2) ----
fig_s5 <- (p_s5a + p_s5b) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s5
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S6.pdf"), fig_s5, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S6.png"), fig_s5, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S7 (new): Young Adults – PA and BMI (2x2) ----
fig_s6 <- ((p_s6_rhr_pa + p_s6_hrv_pa) / (p_s6_rhr_bmi + p_s6_hrv_bmi)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s6
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S7.pdf"), fig_s6, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S7.png"), fig_s6, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S8 (new): Middle-Aged Adults – PA and BMI (2x2) ----
fig_s7 <- ((p_s7_rhr_pa + p_s7_hrv_pa) / (p_s7_rhr_bmi + p_s7_hrv_bmi)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s7
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S8.pdf"), fig_s7, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S8.png"), fig_s7, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ---- Figure S9 (new): Older Adults – PA and BMI (2x2) ----
fig_s8 <- ((p_s8_rhr_pa + p_s8_hrv_pa) / (p_s8_rhr_bmi + p_s8_hrv_bmi)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
fig_s8
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S9.pdf"), fig_s8, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(sup_dir, "Figure_S9.png"), fig_s8, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

### Export Results as CSVs
```{r}
# Exports bootstrap amplitude summaries, pairwise p-values, attenuation estimates, and Aug/Dec contrasts for every aim to the Results CSVs directory. Each numbered block below corresponds to a figure in the paper.
csv_dir <- "/Users/gregory.grosicki/Desktop/Seasonality/Results CSVs"
dir.create(csv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- 1. Overall amplitude (Figure S1) ----
overall_amp <- tibble(
  Outcome = c("RHR", "HRV"),
  mean_amp = c(
    mean(boot_rhr_overall$amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(boot_hrv_overall$amplitude, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  ci_low = c(
    quantile(boot_rhr_overall$amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    quantile(boot_hrv_overall$amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  ci_high = c(
    quantile(boot_rhr_overall$amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    quantile(boot_hrv_overall$amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)
write.csv(overall_amp, file.path(csv_dir, "overall_amplitude.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# ---- 2. Amplitude by Age – GAM bootstrap (Figure 1A/C) ----
boot_age_rhr <- boot_rhr_age %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Outcome = "RHR")
boot_age_hrv <- boot_hrv_age %>%
  group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
  summarise(mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Outcome = "HRV")
write.csv(bind_rows(boot_age_rhr, boot_age_hrv), file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_age_GAM.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Pairwise p-values
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), boot_pvals_hrv_age %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_age_GAM_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 3. Amplitude by Age – GAMM point estimates (Figure S2A/C) ----
write.csv(
  bind_rows(amplitude_gamm %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), amplitude_gamm_hrv %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_age_GAMM.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 4. GAMM pairwise contrasts by Age at Aug/Dec (Figure S2B/D) ----
write.csv(contrasts_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), file.path(csv_dir, "GAMM_age_contrasts_RHR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
# HRV contrasts (same structure computed in HRV GAMM section)
if (exists("contrasts_all_hrv")) {
  write.csv(contrasts_all_hrv %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV"), file.path(csv_dir, "GAMM_age_contrasts_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 5. Individual-level amplitude by Age (Figure 1B/D) ----
write.csv(amplitude_summary %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_by_age_RHR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
if (exists("amplitude_summary_hrv")) {
  write.csv(amplitude_summary_hrv %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV"), file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_by_age_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 6. Amplitude by Sex – GAM bootstrap (Figure 2A/C) ----
boot_sex_rhr <- boot_rhr_sex %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Outcome = "RHR")
boot_sex_hrv <- boot_hrv_sex %>%
  group_by(GENDER) %>%
  summarise(mean_amp = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_low = quantile(amplitude, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
            ci_high = quantile(amplitude, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Outcome = "HRV")
write.csv(bind_rows(boot_sex_rhr, boot_sex_hrv), file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_sex_GAM.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Pairwise p-values
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_sex_rhr %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), boot_pvals_sex_hrv %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_sex_GAM_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 7. Amplitude by Sex – GAMM point estimates (Figure S3A/C) ----
write.csv(
  bind_rows(amplitude_gamm_gender %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), amplitude_gamm_gender_hrv %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_sex_GAMM.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 8. GAMM pairwise contrasts by Sex at Aug/Dec (Figure S3B/D) ----
write.csv(gender_contrasts %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), file.path(csv_dir, "GAMM_sex_contrasts_RHR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(gender_contrasts_hrv %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV"), file.path(csv_dir, "GAMM_sex_contrasts_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# ---- 9. Attenuation results (Figure 3D-I) ----
extract_attenuation <- function(att, label) {
  amp_diff <- att$amp_base - att$amp_adj
  tibble(
    Covariate = label,
    mean_base = mean(att$amp_base),
    ci_base_low = quantile(att$amp_base, 0.025),
    ci_base_high = quantile(att$amp_base, 0.975),
    mean_adj = mean(att$amp_adj),
    ci_adj_low = quantile(att$amp_adj, 0.025),
    ci_adj_high = quantile(att$amp_adj, 0.975),
    mean_diff = mean(att$amp_base) - mean(att$amp_adj),
    ci_diff_low = quantile(amp_diff, 0.025),
    ci_diff_high = quantile(amp_diff, 0.975),
    pct_attenuation = (mean(att$amp_base) - mean(att$amp_adj)) / mean(att$amp_base) * 100,
    n_valid = att$n_valid
  )
}

attenuation_results <- bind_rows(
  extract_attenuation(att_rhr_pa, "PA") %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
  extract_attenuation(att_hrv_pa, "PA") %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV"),
  extract_attenuation(att_rhr_sleep, "Sleep") %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
  extract_attenuation(att_hrv_sleep, "Sleep") %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")
)
write.csv(attenuation_results, file.path(csv_dir, "attenuation_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# ---- 10. Adjusted amplitude by Age (Figure S5) ----
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_rhr %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), bootstrap_summary_hrv_adj %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "adjusted_amplitude_by_age.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_rhr %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), boot_pvals_hrv_adj %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "adjusted_amplitude_by_age_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 11. PA moderation – All ages (Figure 4A/B) ----
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_pa_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), bootstrap_summary_hrv_pa_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_all.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_pa_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), boot_pvals_hrv_pa_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_all_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 12. BMI moderation – All ages (Figure 4C/D) ----
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_bmi_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), bootstrap_summary_hrv_bmi_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_all.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_bmi_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), boot_pvals_hrv_bmi_all %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_all_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 13. Age-stratified PA moderation (Figures S6-S8) ----
# Young
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_pa_y %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), bootstrap_summary_hrv_y %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_young.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_pa_y %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"), boot_pvals_hrv_y %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_young_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# Middle
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_pa_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            bootstrap_summary_hrv_pa_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_middle.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_pa_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            boot_pvals_hrv_pa_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_middle_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# Old
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_pa_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            bootstrap_summary_hrv_pa_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_old.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_pa_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            boot_pvals_hrv_pa_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_PA_old_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 14. Age-stratified BMI moderation (Figures S6-S8) ----
# Young
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_bmi_young %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            bootstrap_summary_bmi_hrv_young %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_young.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_bmi_young %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            boot_pvals_bmi_hrv_young %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_young_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# Middle
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_bmi_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            bootstrap_summary_hrv_bmi_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_middle.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_bmi_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            boot_pvals_hrv_bmi_mid %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_middle_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# Old
write.csv(
  bind_rows(bootstrap_summary_bmi_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            bootstrap_summary_hrv_bmi_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_old.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  bind_rows(boot_pvals_bmi_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR"),
            boot_pvals_hrv_bmi_old %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")),
  file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_BMI_old_pvals.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# ---- 15. Mixed model ANOVA and emmeans for Aug/Dec comparisons ----
# Age × Month (RHR)
emm_age_month_rhr <- as.data.frame(emmeans(model_aug_dec_rhr_age, pairwise ~ AGE_BUCKET | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")$contrasts)
emm_month_age_rhr <- as.data.frame(emmeans(model_aug_dec_rhr_age, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | AGE_BUCKET, adjust = "holm")$contrasts)
write.csv(emm_age_month_rhr, file.path(csv_dir, "emmeans_age_within_month_RHR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(emm_month_age_rhr, file.path(csv_dir, "emmeans_month_within_age_RHR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Age × Month (HRV)
emm_age_month_hrv <- as.data.frame(emmeans(model_aug_dec_hrv_age, pairwise ~ AGE_BUCKET | MONTH_LABEL, adjust = "holm")$contrasts)
emm_month_age_hrv <- as.data.frame(emmeans(model_aug_dec_hrv_age, pairwise ~ MONTH_LABEL | AGE_BUCKET, adjust = "holm")$contrasts)
write.csv(emm_age_month_hrv, file.path(csv_dir, "emmeans_age_within_month_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(emm_month_age_hrv, file.path(csv_dir, "emmeans_month_within_age_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Sex × Month (RHR)
anova_sex_rhr <- as.data.frame(anova(model_aug_dec_rhr_gender))
write.csv(anova_sex_rhr, file.path(csv_dir, "anova_sex_month_RHR.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

# Sex × Month (HRV)
anova_sex_hrv <- as.data.frame(anova(model_hrv_gender_interact))
write.csv(anova_sex_hrv, file.path(csv_dir, "anova_sex_month_HRV.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

# Individual-level amplitude Tukey (HRV)
emm_hrv_age <- emmeans(model_amplitude_hrv, ~ AGE_BUCKET)
tukey_hrv_age <- as.data.frame(pairs(emm_hrv_age, adjust = "tukey"))
write.csv(tukey_hrv_age, file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_tukey_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Individual-level amplitude by Sex (RHR)
  tukey_sex_rhr <- as.data.frame(pairs(emmeans(model_amplitude_gender, ~ GENDER), adjust = "tukey"))                                                                               
  write.csv(tukey_sex_rhr, file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_tukey_sex_RHR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)   
  
  tukey_sex_hrv <- as.data.frame(pairs(emmeans(model_amplitude_gender_hrv, ~ GENDER), adjust = "tukey"))
  write.csv(tukey_sex_hrv, file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_tukey_sex_HRV.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# ---- 16. Geographic daylight-amplitude regression (Figure S9) ----
write.csv(daylight_results, file.path(csv_dir, "amplitude_by_daylight.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("All results CSVs saved to:", csv_dir, "\n")
```

## Sensitivity: December–January average as winter reference (individual-level)

```{r winter-avg-sensitivity}
# Holiday-related behavior is concentrated in late December. To confirm the
# winter peak is not December-specific, we recompute per-person seasonal
# amplitude using the mean of December and January as the winter reference
# (instead of December alone) and re-test age and sex group differences.
# This is the individual-level (no-spline) analog of Fig 1B/D and Fig 2B/D,
# computed on the same person-mean-centered scale (RHR_within / HRV_within),
# so values are directly comparable to the December-only estimates.

# ---- Winter = mean(December, January); Summer = August ----
df_winteravg <- df_month %>%
  filter(MONTH_NUM %in% c(1, 8, 12)) %>%
  mutate(SEASON = if_else(MONTH_NUM == 8, "August", "Winter")) %>%
  group_by(USER_ID, SEASON) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rhr        = mean(RHR_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_hrv        = mean(HRV_within, na.rm = TRUE),
    AGE_BUCKET      = first(AGE_BUCKET),
    AGE_2023        = first(AGE_2023),
    BMI             = first(BMI),
    GENDER          = first(GENDER),
    RHR_person_mean = first(RHR_person_mean),
    HRV_person_mean = first(HRV_person_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# RHR amplitude = Winter - August (winter minus summer)
df_amp_rhr_wa <- df_winteravg %>%
  select(USER_ID, SEASON, mean_rhr, AGE_BUCKET, AGE_2023, BMI, GENDER, RHR_person_mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_rhr) %>%
  mutate(amplitude = Winter - August)

# HRV amplitude = August - Winter (summer minus winter)
df_amp_hrv_wa <- df_winteravg %>%
  select(USER_ID, SEASON, mean_hrv, AGE_BUCKET, AGE_2023, BMI, GENDER, HRV_person_mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = SEASON, values_from = mean_hrv) %>%
  mutate(amplitude = August - Winter)

# ---- Per-age summaries (compare against the December-only values) ----
summarise_amp_wa <- function(d) {
  d %>%
    group_by(AGE_BUCKET) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_amplitude = mean(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_amplitude   = sd(amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
      n              = n(),
      mean_sd        = paste0(round(mean_amplitude, 2), " ± ", round(sd_amplitude, 2)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}
amp_age_rhr_wa <- summarise_amp_wa(df_amp_rhr_wa) %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR", Winter_ref = "Dec-Jan avg")
amp_age_hrv_wa <- summarise_amp_wa(df_amp_hrv_wa) %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV", Winter_ref = "Dec-Jan avg")
cat("\n--- Individual-level amplitude by age (Dec-Jan average winter reference) ---\n")
print(amp_age_rhr_wa); print(amp_age_hrv_wa)

# ---- Age group differences (mirrors Fig 1B/D adjustment set) ----
model_amp_rhr_wa <- lm(amplitude ~ AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + RHR_person_mean, data = df_amp_rhr_wa)
model_amp_hrv_wa <- lm(amplitude ~ AGE_BUCKET + GENDER + BMI + HRV_person_mean, data = df_amp_hrv_wa)
tukey_age_rhr_wa <- as.data.frame(pairs(emmeans(model_amp_rhr_wa, ~ AGE_BUCKET), adjust = "tukey")) %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR")
tukey_age_hrv_wa <- as.data.frame(pairs(emmeans(model_amp_hrv_wa, ~ AGE_BUCKET), adjust = "tukey")) %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")
cat("\n--- Age pairwise contrasts (Dec-Jan average winter reference) ---\n")
print(tukey_age_rhr_wa); print(tukey_age_hrv_wa)

# ---- Sex group differences (mirrors Fig 2B/D adjustment set) ----
model_amp_rhr_sex_wa <- lm(amplitude ~ GENDER + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + RHR_person_mean, data = df_amp_rhr_wa)
model_amp_hrv_sex_wa <- lm(amplitude ~ GENDER + splines::ns(AGE_2023, df = 3) + BMI + HRV_person_mean, data = df_amp_hrv_wa)
tukey_sex_rhr_wa <- as.data.frame(pairs(emmeans(model_amp_rhr_sex_wa, ~ GENDER), adjust = "tukey")) %>% mutate(Outcome = "RHR")
tukey_sex_hrv_wa <- as.data.frame(pairs(emmeans(model_amp_hrv_sex_wa, ~ GENDER), adjust = "tukey")) %>% mutate(Outcome = "HRV")
cat("\n--- Sex pairwise contrasts (Dec-Jan average winter reference) ---\n")
print(tukey_sex_rhr_wa); print(tukey_sex_hrv_wa)

# ---- Save ----
write.csv(bind_rows(amp_age_rhr_wa, amp_age_hrv_wa),
          file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_winteravg_by_age.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(bind_rows(tukey_age_rhr_wa, tukey_age_hrv_wa),
          file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_winteravg_tukey_age.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(bind_rows(tukey_sex_rhr_wa, tukey_sex_hrv_wa),
          file.path(csv_dir, "individual_amplitude_winteravg_tukey_sex.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nWinter-average sensitivity CSVs saved to:", csv_dir, "\n")
```
